listings.title: International Talent Programme (ITP)
listings.description:
ING International Talent Programme is a two year journey designed for bold and curious graduates who want to grow with purpose, explore their strengths, and build a meaningful international career. It offers the chance to work in a diverse, global environment while gaining the skills and confidence to shape your future.

Throughout the programme, you’ll take part in impactful projects, experience agile ways of working, and develop yourself with the support of dedicated mentors and inspiring colleagues. We’ll guide you — but you’ll define your direction. That’s what “do your thing” truly means at ING.

If you’re a Bachelor’s or Master’s graduate with big ambitions, global mindset and a desire to grow into a future leader, this programme could be the perfect next step.

Interested?

What do we offer:

At ING we want your work to fulfill you in every way, and that is why we take care of even the smallest detail.

Here at ING , you are first yourself, then an ING’er, therefore;

-
Learning and Growth Opportunities:
Access to global/local academies, top university programs, and various training sessions to boost your career
-
Flexible Work Environment:
14 days of welcome leave, hybrid working with flexible days, and remote work every 3rd week
-
Dynamic and Diverse Culture : A dynamic, innovative environment with opportunities to work on local and global projects, offering international experience
-
Social and Fun Work Environment:
Participate in social clubs and company events while enjoying a fun and supportive workplace
-
Comprehensive Benefits:
Life and health insurance, banking benefits, and a private pension plan to secure your future

To discover more on “Do Your Thing” please visit;

If you think you have the following qualifications;

- Banking industry enthusiast with a strong academic record (Bachelor’s/Master’s) and up to 2 years of experience,
- Fluent in English and Turkish, with strong analytical, strategic thinking, and problem-solving skills,
- Customer-focused, results-driven, and digitally savvy, with excellent communication and organizational abilities,
- Proactive, innovative, and a great team player who thrives in diverse environments,
- Experience in internships, volunteering, leadership, or a financial postgraduate degree is a plus.

If you think you are fit for a company which;

- Promotes freedom and fun at work with,
- Empowers customers and employees to stay a step ahead in life and in business, with digital innovative solutions,
-
Provides you a development path among four different tracks: Wholesale Banking, Finance, Technology, and Risk,

For more information about four different departments please visit our website:

https://careers.ing.com/en/expertise-teams

We are looking forward to meeting you!

listings.title: Doğanı Keşfet Staj Programı
listings.description:
Doğan Grubu olarak, 60 yılı aşkın süredir faaliyet gösterdiğimiz geniş coğrafyada, uluslararası gruplarla kurduğumuz stratejik iş birlikleri sayesinde faaliyetlerimizi verimli bir şekilde yürütüyoruz.

Değer odaklı yatırım anlayışını benimseyen ve dünyada pozitif etki yaratmayı amaçlayan sorumlu bir yatırım holdingiyiz. Amacımız, uzun vadeli çözümler üreterek bulunduğumuz bölgelerde daha iyi bir gelecek için liderlik yapmak ve bu anlayışla mevcut yatırımlarımızı dönüştürmek.

Bizi Biz Yapan Değerlerimiz:

Biz birbirimizin emeğinin, insanımızın, ülkemizin değerini biliyor, işimizi tutkuyla sahipleniyor, sorumlu ve şeffaf davranıyoruz. Yenilikçi, girişimci ruhla, cesaretle ve birlikte başarma kültürümüzle hareket ediyoruz. Köklü kurumların maddi varlıklar kazanma motivasyonundan çok, değerler üzerinde yükseldiği bilinciyle değerlerimize sahip çıkıp onları yaşıyor ve yaşatıyor; değer bilip değer katıyoruz.
Değerlerimizden aldığımız güçle, değer odaklı bir kurum olma özelliğimizi perçinleyerek grubumuzun başarında en önemli etkenin donanımlı ve yetkin insan kaynağımız olduğunu bilerek sürdürülebilir ve istikrarlı yolculuğumuza devam ediyoruz.

Markalarımız:

- Elektrik Üretimi: Galatawind, Sunflower Solar, Aslancık
- Sanayi & Ticaret: Karel, Sesa Ambalaj, Maksipak Ambalaj
- Otomotiv Ticareti & Pazarlama: Doğan Trend Otomotiv
- Finansman &Yatırım: Doğan Yatırım Bankası, Doruk Faktoring, Hepiyi Sigorta
- İnternet & Eğlence: Kanal D Romanya, Doğan Yayınları,
Hepsi Emlak

- Gayrimenkul Yatırımları: Trump Towers İstanbul, Milta Bodrum Marina, Double Tree by
Hilton Bodrum Marina Vista

- Madencilik: Gümüştaş Madencilik, Esen Madencilik

Doğan’ı Keşfet, Kariyerini Başlat!

Birbirinden farklı yedi sektörde faaliyet gösteren Doğan Holding ve şirketlerinde birlikte başarmaya, yenilik katmaya, birbirinden önemli projelerde rol almaya, potansiyelini ortaya koymaya hazır mısın?
‘Doğan’ı Keşfet’ staj programıyla kariyerine atacağın ilk adım için seni bekliyoruz!

Aranan Nitelikler

- Lisans eğitiminin 3. / 4. Sınıf öğrencisi,
- 2026 Haziran ayı veya sonrası mezunu,
- İyi seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip,
- 2026 Haziran-Eylül ayları arasında staj yapabilecek,
- İletişim becerileri güçlü,
- Yeni deneyimler kazanmak için heyecanlanan,
- Hep daha iyisi için çalışan,
- Program süresi boyunca haftada en az 3 gün bizimle birlikte olabilecek ve program bitiminde
takımımızın bir parçası olmaya adaysan başvurunu bekliyoruz!

Ayrıcalıklar

- İş hayatından sorumluluk ve deneyim kazanma imkanı,
- Becerilerini geliştirme ve potansiyelini ortaya çıkarma fırsatı,
- Alanında deneyimli ekip arkadaşları ile çalışma ortamı,
- Şirket yöneticileri ile birlikte vakit geçirerek onların bilgilerinden ve deneyimlerinden
yararlanma imkanı,

- Zengin içerikli eğitim platformumuzu kullanma fırsatı.

listings.title: KAŞİF (Öğrenci Programı) 2026
listings.description:
Kuveyt Türk Kaşif Programı 2026:
"Gerçekten" Sağlam Bir Kariyer Seni Bekliyor!

Klasik kariyer yollarını bir kenara bırak. Avrupa’nın ve Türkiye’nin "En İyi İşverenleri" listesinde zirveye oynayan; ödeme sistemleri, yazılım, sigortacılık, yatırım ve portföy yönetimi gibi alanlardaki iştirakleriyle teknoloji ve inovasyon odaklı büyüyen dev bir ekosistemde yer almaya hazır mısın?

Burada seni "gerçek" bir kariyer yolculuğu, samimi bir gelişim ortamı ve potansiyelini sonuna kadar kullanabileceğin fırsatlar bekliyor.

Yeteneklerine güveniyorsan ayrıcalıklarla dolu bu staj deneyimi tam sana göre!

Seni "Gerçekten" Neler Bekliyor?

-
Güçlü Mentorluk:
Bu süreçte yalnız değilsin. Mentörlerin sayesinde kariyerine sağlam ve bilinçli adımlarla başlarsın.
-
Devamlı Gelişim:
Kuveyt Türk Akademi’nin tasarladığı özel eğitim programları ve gelişim desteğiyle öğrenme yolculuğunda güçlü bir ivme kazanırsın.
-
Esnek Çalışma Düzeni:
İşin okuluna göre şekil alır! Seçtiğin günlerde çalışabilir ve yoğun dönemlerde odağını derslerine verebilirsin.
-
Hibrit Çalışma

Özgürlüğü:
Genel Müdürlük kaşifleri için haftada en az 1 gün ofisten, 2 güne kadar da uzaktan çalışabilir; yıl içinde ise 2 ay boyunca dilediğin yerden çalışabilirsin!
-
İşe Alımlarda Öncelik Hakkı : Bu programı başarıyla tamamladığında yetenek programlarımızda öncelikli bir yer edinirsin! (Management Trainee / Sales Trainee / İç Kontrol / D3)

Kimler Başvurabilir?

- Üniversitede 3. veya 4. sınıfsan,
- İyi seviye İngilizce biliyorum diyorsan,
- Ekip çalışmalarında aranan isimsen,
- Teknoloji trendleri benden sorulur, inovatif düşünürüm diyorsan,
- Ve en önemlisi: katılım bankacılığına "gerçek" bir adım atmak istiyorsan, seni bekliyoruz!

Kariyerine sağlam bir başlangıç yapmak ve gerçek kariyer hikayeni yazmak için hemen başvur!

listings.title: Kuveyt Türk Yetenek Programı
listings.description:
Klasik kariyer yollarını bir kenara bırak. Avrupa’nın ve Türkiye’nin "En İyi İşverenleri" listesinde zirveye oynayan; ödeme sistemleri, yazılım, sigortacılık, yatırım ve portföy yönetimi gibi alanlardaki iştirakleriyle teknoloji ve inovasyon odaklı büyüyen dev bir ekosistemde yer almaya hazır mısın?

Burada seni "gerçek" bir kariyer yolculuğu, samimi bir gelişim ortamı ve potansiyelini sonuna kadar kullanabileceğin fırsatlar bekliyor.

Tek bir başvuru çatısı altında, hedeflerine en uygun 4 farklı rotamız var:

-
Management Trainee (MT):
Management Trainee programımızda Genel Müdürlükte dijitalleşmeden finansa, veriden yapay zekaya kadar bankanın geleceğini şekillendiren projelerde yer alırsın.
-
Sales Trainee:
İletişimim kuvvetli, sahada olmayı ve network kurmayı severim diyorsan, kurumsal ve ticari müşterilerimize değer katan çözümler sunarak portföy yönetiminin yıldızı olabilirsin.
-
D3 - Müfettiş Yardımcılığı:
Geleceğin denetim profesyoneli olarak hem dijital dönüşümü denetle hem de Türkiye’yi gez!
-
İç Kontrol:
Bankanın tüm süreçlerine hâkim olmak, riskleri yönetmek ve bir danışman gibi tüm departmanlara yol göstermek istiyorsan bu programımız tam sana göre.

Seni "Gerçekten" Neler Bekliyor?

-
Devamlı Gelişim:
Kuveyt Türk Akademi’nin tasarladığı özel eğitim kampları ve Yüksek Lisans desteğiyle öğrenme yolculuğun hiç bitmez.
-
Güçlü Mentorluk:
Bu süreçte yalnız değilsin. Mentörlerin sayesinde kariyerine sağlam adımlarla başlarsın.
-
Rekabetçi Ödül Paketi:
Sektörde fark yaratan ücretlendirme paketiyle emeğinin karşılığını "gerçekten" alırsın.
-
Sepetim ile Esnek Yan Haklar:
Bize uyma, biz sana uyalım! Özel sağlık sigortasından alışveriş çeklerine, teknolojiden tatile kadar yan haklarını "Sepetim" uygulamasında dilediğin gibi esnetip harcayabilirsin.
-
Hibrit Çalışma Özgürlüğü:
Genel Müdürlük ekipleri için haftada 2 gün uzaktan, yılda 2 ay ise dilediğin yerden çalışabilirsin!

Kimler Başvurabilir?

- 2025 mezunuysan veya 2026’da mezun olacaksan,
- İyi seviye İngilizce biliyorum diyorsan,
- Teknoloji trendleri benden sorulur, analitik düşünürüm diyorsan,

Ve en önemlisi: katılım bankacılığında "gerçek" bir iz bırakmak istiyorsan, seni bekliyoruz!

listings.title: Sancore Yaz Staj Programı 2026
listings.description:
SANKO Holding Hakkında

1900’lerden bugüne 120 yıldır Türkiye’ye hizmet eden SANKO Holding, bugün tekstilden enerjiye, inşaattan ambalaja 11 farklı sektörde 14.000’den fazla çalışanı hem yerel hem de global ölçekteki yatırımları ile sürekli gelişen bir iş hacmine sahiptir. Kurucusu merhum Sani Konukoğlu'nun azmini ve mücadeleci yapısını miras alan SANKO Holding, kurulduğu günden beri ülke çıkarlarını her şeyin üzerinde tutmaya azami özen göstermekte; daha çok yatırım, daha çok üretim ve daha çok istihdam sağlama hedefleriyle ülkemiz ve toplumumuz için çalışmaktadır. Aktif olduğu sektörlerde her zaman gerek üretim kalitesi gerekse vizyon ve felsefesiyle belirleyici konumda olan SANKO Holding, ticari faaliyetlerinin yanında sosyal sorumluluk yaklaşımıyla büyüyen ve gelişen Türkiye’ye katkı sağlamaktadır. 1989 yılında kurulan SANKO Vakfı aracılığıyla eğitim, sağlık, kültür ve sanat alanlarındaki faaliyetleri ile toplumumuzun ve gelecek kuşakların hizmetindedir.

SANCORE Yaz Staj Programı

Potansiyelini ortaya çıkaracağın bir yaz seni bekliyor.

Kariyerine SANKO’da yön ver!

KİMLER BAŞVURABİLİR?

- Üniversitelerin 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrencisiysen,
- Gaziantep ya da İstanbul lokasyonlarında bulunabiliyorsan,
- Mühendislik, işletme, finans, insan kaynakları gibi bölümlerde öğrenim görüyorsan,
- Öğrenmeye açık, takım çalışmasına yatkın ve dinamik bir ekip ortamında gelişmek istiyorsan,

SANCORE Yaz Staj Programı tam sana göre!

PROGRAM DETAYLARI

- Son Başvuru: 17 Nisan 2026
- Staj Dönemi: Haziran – Eylül 2026
- Lokasyonlar: Gaziantep & İstanbul

Başvuru ve Değerlendirme Sürecimiz

SANKO Holding olarak, işe alım sürecinde tüm adaylara fırsat eşitliği sağlıyoruz. Başvurularımız, ırk, cinsiyet, renk, ulusal veya sosyal köken, etnik köken, din, yaş, engellilik durumu, cinsel yönelim, toplumsal cinsiyet ifadesi, medeni durum, siyasi görüş veya yasalarla korunan diğer statüler temelinde hiçbir ayrımcılık yapmaksızın değerlendirilecektir.

At SANKO Holding, we ensure equal opportunity for all candidates in our recruitment process. Applications will be evaluated without discrimination based on race, gender, color, national or social origin, ethnic origin, religion, age, disability status, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, political views, or other statuses protected by applicable laws.

listings.title: Cheers to Careers – Short-Term Summer Internship Program 2026
listings.description:
Pernod Ricard is Conviviality

At Pernod Ricard, we are Créateurs de Convivialité.

Conviviality is the spirit that brings people together and shapes the way we work, collaborate and grow. It is at the heart of our culture and the experience people feel when they become part of Pernod Ricard.

With our employer value proposition “Craft Your Path” , we empower young talents to explore their potential, learn from industry experts and gain real business exposure.

About the Program

Pernod Ricard Türkiye is excited to launch the Cheers to Careers Short-Term Summer Internship Program 2026.

This program offers university students a 2-month immersive internship experience where interns will work closely with experienced professionals, contribute to real business projects and gain exposure to the dynamic world of the FMCG industry.

Throughout the program, interns will be supported by an internship coach, collaborate with cross-functional teams and experience Pernod Ricard’s unique culture of conviviality.

Program Timeline

Application Opening:
16 March 2026

Application Deadline:
17 April 2026

Interview Process:
27 April – 8 May 2026

Internship Start:
1 June 2026

Internship End:
31 July 2026

Target Intern Profile

We are looking for curious and motivated university students who are eager to gain hands-on experience in a global FMCG environment.

Candidates are expected to:

- Be
2nd or 3rd year undergraduate students

- Be available for a
mandatory internship required by their university

- Have
university-provided internship insurance (mandatory)

- Demonstrate strong communication skills and curiosity to learn

- Be motivated to explore different business functions and collaborate with diverse teams

As Pernod Ricard Türkiye operates within management functions , internships will be project-based and office-focused.

Departments Offering Internships

Internship opportunities will be available across the following departments:

- Marketing

- Sales

- Business Development & Trade Marketing

- Supply Chain

- Finance

- Human Resources

- Corporate Communications

- Global Tech (IT)

Orientation & Internship Experience

The program will begin with a Welcome & Orientation Session , where interns will be introduced to Pernod Ricard Türkiye, our brands, culture and ways of working.

Throughout the internship, participants will:

- Work on
real business projects within their departments

- Collaborate with different teams and stakeholders

- Receive guidance from their
internship coach

- Gain insight into the
FMCG and premium spirits industry

Final Presentations

At the end of the program, interns will present their projects in a company-wide final presentation session , sharing their insights and learning journey with leaders and teams across Pernod Ricard Türkiye.

Inclusive Culture

At Pernod Ricard, we believe that diversity fuels creativity and innovation.

Our recruitment process is based on Pernod Ricard Leadership Attributes and technical capabilities, ensuring a fair and inclusive evaluation for all candidates.

Join us for a summer of learning, collaboration and conviviality.

Start crafting your path with Pernod Ricard Türkiye.

listings.title: Graphic Design Intern
listings.description:
About the job

Company Description

At Otsimo, we believe every child deserves the chance to learn and grow to their fullest potential. We work for and believe in affordable and accessible education for special children. We are determined to improve our range and quality of practices until special education is available and accessible to each and every child with special needs such as autism, down syndrome, or other learning disorders. Our team is data and impact-driven has touched the lives of more than 3.000.000 children from all around the world. (https://otsimo.com/en/about-us/)

We create fun, accessible educational games and tools for children with special needs like autism, down syndrome, and other learning disorders. Our work has already made a difference in the lives of over a million children worldwide!
Join us and use your artistic talent to shape a more inclusive future in education.

Role Description

This is an open call for 2026 Summer.

This internship takes ~12 weeks (at least 3mos program).

We're looking for a passionate graphic design intern to join our team for the internship! This 12-week program will give you hands-on experience bringing a real Otsimo project to life. You'll:

- Create visually engaging designs: Produce graphics for product features, marketing materials, and digital platforms that make learning visually engaging and accessible.
- Collaborate to bring ideas to life: Work alongside designers, illustrators, and developers to transform concepts into effective visual solutions.
- Support brand consistency: Help maintain and develop Otsimo’s visual identity across different touchpoints.
- Make a real impact: See your designs contribute to products that help children learn and thrive.

Required Skills

-
Currently enrolled in a full-time degree program

- Strong illustration portfolio: Show us your unique artistic style and ability to tell stories through images.

Preferred Qualifications

- Familiarity with design software such as Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and/or Figma.
- Ability to communicate ideas effectively and work collaboratively within a team
- Passion for visual storytelling and a keen eye for detail

What We Offer

- Free healthy snacks and drinks, plus lunch card.
- Remote-first office policy
- Monthly happy hours and company events.
- Pet-friendly office.
- A challenging and fulfilling opportunity to join one of the most experienced teams in EdTech and help create a completely new kind of special school.

listings.title: Unity Developer Intern
listings.description:
Company Description

We work for and believe in affordable and accessible education for special children. We are determined to improve our range and quality of practices until special education is available and accessible to each and every child with special needs such as autism, down syndrome, or other learning disorders.
Our team is data and impact-driven has touched the lives of more than 1.000.000 children from all around the world.

Otsimo is actively building a team of people from many cultures and communities. Bringing together talented people with different perspectives and lived experiences makes our team stronger, so we can humbly build things that include, empower and inspire kids around the world.

Role Description

This is an open call for 2026 Summer.

This internship takes ~12 weeks (at least 3mos program).

During the internship, your responsibility will be to come up with a solution for our real project study that will be assigned to you. What we expect you to do in this project is to apply modern software engineering methods, leverage frameworks, and libraries, and collaborate with team members on projects and ideas.

Required Skills

Musts:

- Currently enrolled in a full-time degree program,
- Experience in Unity development,
- Programming skills in C#,
- Familiarity with game development principles.

Preferred qualifications:

- Solid foundation in computer science, with expertise in data structures, and algorithms,
- Strong object-oriented programming skills,
- Knowledge of Unix/Linux and experience with APIs,
- Experience with visual design concepts.

What We Offer

- Free healthy snacks and drinks, plus lunch card.
- Remote-first office policy
- Monthly happy hours and company events.
- Pet-friendly office.
- A challenging and fulfilling opportunity to join one of the most experienced teams in EdTech and help create a completely new kind of special school.

listings.title: TEMSA Talent Station
listings.description:
TEMSA Talent Station, üniversite öğrencilerinin ve yeni mezunların gerçek projeler üzerinde çalışarak iş hayatını yakından deneyimlediği; eğitimler, kariyer buluşmaları ve sosyal etkinliklerle zenginleştirilmiş 6 aylık (2 ay tam zamanlı + 4 ay yarı zamanlı) uçtan uca bir gelişim programıdır.

Bu yolculukta TEMSA liderleriyle bir araya gelir, kişisel ve profesyonel gelişimini destekleyen eğitimler alır, projelerle kendini gösterme fırsatı yakalarsın. Öğrenmeyi eğlenceli hale getiren bu deneyim, aynı zamanda geleceğin yeteneklerini keşfetmeye ve geliştirmeye odaklanan bir yetenek kazanımı programıdır.

Akıllı ve sürdürülebilir mobilite vizyonumuz doğrultusunda; Türkiye’nin ilk AR-GE merkezine sahip ve ilk elektrikli otobüsünü üreten inovatif ekiple tanışır, geleceği şekillendiren işlerin parçası olursun.

Eğer sen de bu dönüşümün içinde yer almak istiyorsan, bu durak tam sana göre:

#BuDuraktaKariyerVar

TEMSA Talent Station’da seni neler bekliyor?

- Program sürecindeki performansına bağlı olarak
TEMSA’da açılacak pozisyonlar için öncelikli, değerlendirilme imkanı,

- Gelişim yolculuğunu destekleyecek kapsamlı eğitimler ve öğrenme fırsatları,
- TEMSA liderlerinden mentorluk desteği,
- Mersin ve Adana dışından gelen katılımcılar için
2 ay konaklama,

- Servis ve yemek imkanı,
- TEMSA kültürünü yakından tanıyabileceğin sosyal ve networking etkinlikleri,
- Türkiye’nin ilk AR-GE merkezi ve elektrikli otobüs teknolojileriyle
yakından çalışma deneyimi.

TEMSA'da çalışabileceğin departmanlar aşağıdaki gibidir;

- ARGE VE TEKNOLOJİ
- BİLGİ TEKNOLOJİLERİ
- HUKUK
- İNSAN KAYNAKLARI VE SÜRDÜRÜLEBİLİRLİK
- KURUMSAL İLETİŞİM
- MALİ İŞLER
- OPERASYON
- SATIŞ EMEA
- SATIŞ TR
- SATIŞ SONRASI HİZMETLER
- STRATEJİ, İŞ GELİŞTİRME VE PAZARLAMA

Programın Hedef Kitlesi

-
Üniversitede son sınıftaysan, yeni mezun olup iş hayatında 0-1 yıl deneyime sahipsen ya da yüksek lisans yolculuğuna başlamışsan,

-
İngilizceyi akıcı bir şekilde kullanabiliyorsan (Upper-Intermediate (B2) ve üstü),

-
Hayal gücüne, problem çözme becerine ve iletişim gücüne güveniyorsan,

-
Takım ruhunu seviyor ve birlikte üretmekten keyif alıyorsan,

-
Teoriyi pratiğe dönüştürmek için sabırsızlanıyorsan,

-
Global ölçekte projelerde yer almayı deneyimlemek ediyorsan,

-
Fikirlerini özgürce paylaşmaktan, merakla soru sormaktan ve deneyerek öğrenmekten keyif alıyorsan,

-
Hayallerini gerçeğe dönüştürmek ve dünyayı daha yaşanabilir, sürdürülebilir bir yer yapmak istiyorsan…

O zaman TEMSA Talent Station tam sana göre! Programımıza başvurularını bekliyoruz!

listings.title: TechTalent 2026
listings.description:
Architecht TechTalent 2026

Kariyerine anlamlı bir başlangıç yapmak, hem kişisel gelişimini hem de kariyer adımlarını önemseyen bir ekibin parçası olmak istiyorsan, doğru yerdesin!

Sektörde kilometre taşı niteliğinde ürünler geliştiren, bu ürünleriyle ulusal ve uluslararası otoriteler tarafından ödüllendirilen bir şirketin parçası olmayı hayal ediyorsan, Architecht TechTalent Programı tam sana göre.

Üstelik 2025 yılında gerçekleştirdiğimiz TechTalent Programı, “En İyi Yetenek Programı” ödülüne layık görülerek başarısını tescilledi!

2026 yılında bu başarıyı daha da ileri taşımak için seni bekliyoruz.

TechTalent Programı Nedir?

Geleceği bugüne getiren teknolojilere ilgi duyan genç yetenekleri yetiştiriyoruz!

Yazılım mühendisliği, DevOps, yapay zeka mühendisliği, veri analizi veya iş analizi gibi alanlarda başlayarak hem kendini hem de bulunduğun yeri geliştireceğin bir kariyer yolculuğu seni bekliyor.

Architecht Nasıl Çalışıyor?

- Yenilikçi dijital ürün ve hizmetlerini dünya çapında genişletiyor.

- BOA Bankacılık Platformunu 20 ülkeye ihraç eden teknoloji şirketimiz; geleneksel ve platform bankacılığı, açık bankacılık, bulut teknolojileri, ileri analitik, yapay zekâ ve mobil güvenlik alanlarında uzmanlaşıyor.

- Son teknolojilere ve üretken yapay zeka teknolojilerine dedike ekiplerle bugünü ve geleceği yakından takip ederek iş alanlarını dönüştürüyor.

- XTM, Powerfactor, AirApi, BOA Card gibi finans ve siber güvenlik çözümleriyle global alanda rekabet ediyor.

- Daha fazla bilgi için web sitemizi inceleyebilirsin.

Programın Sunduğu İmkanlar

- Yüksek Lisans Desteği

- Kişiye Özel TechTalent Eğitim Programı

- Kariyer Planlama & Yönetim Desteği

- Özel Ücretlendirme Yapısı

Kimler Başvurabilir?

Bilgisayar, Endüstri, Yazılım, Matematik Mühendisliği veya Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri bölümlerinden 2025 mezunu isen veya 2026 yılında mezun olacaksan başvurabilirsin.

Seçim Süreci

- Ön Değerlendirme ve Başvuru Kabul

- Online Değerlendirme

- İK Mülakatı

- Değerlendirme Merkezi Deneyimi (Case Study)

- Üst Yönetim Panel Mülakatı

Her aşamanın sonucunu, sonuca bağlı kalmaksızın sana ileteceğiz.

Değerlendirme Merkezinde Beklentilerimiz

Yeniliklere açıksan, gelişime önem veriyorsan, analitik düşünce yapısına sahipsen…

Merak etme, tüm bunları gösterebileceğin uygulamalarımız hazır!

Architecht’te Çalışma Deneyimi

Eğitim Olanakları

Online ve sınıf içi eğitimler, yurtdışı eğitim imkanları, yüksek lisans - doktora desteği ve uzmanlık gelişim programlarıyla çalışanlarımızı sürekli destekliyoruz.

Çalışma Ortamı

- 6 yıldır Great Place to Work® tarafından Türkiye’nin En İyi İşverenleri arasındayız.

- %86 çalışan memnuniyeti ile yüksek performanslı global şirketlerin önündeyiz.

- Ayda 6 gün ofisten çalışma ve esnek çalışma saatleri sunuyoruz.

Fiziksel Koşullar

2021’in en popüler ofislerinden seçilen, İstanbul Teknopark’ta yer alan modern çalışma ofisleri.

Teknoloji

Sektörde ilk olarak Oyunbozan Teknolojilere ve Üretken Yapay Zekaya dedike edilmiş ekiplere sahibiz.

ObaWeb platformunu geliştiren güçlü bir teknoloji ekibimiz var.

Bulut, ileri analitik, yapay bilgi edinimi ve biyometrik güvenlik teknolojilerine odaklanıyoruz.

Yan Haklar ve Olanaklar

- Rekabetçi ücret + yıllık performans primi

- Özel sağlık sigortası, servis, yemek ücreti

- Dil tazminatı

- Kurum katkılı bireysel emeklilik

- Ödüllü Esnek Yan Haklar – Sepetim Uygulaması

- Özel gün izinleri: doğum günü, karne günü, evlilik yıl dönümü, bereket izni vb.

listings.title: IC Kuşağı Staj Programı
listings.description:
IC Holding ve Grup Şirketlerinin hedeflerinden, ilkelerinden ve değerlerinden yola çıkarak, doğru pozisyona doğru stajyerleri yerleştirebilmek ve stajyerlerin staj deneyimlerini iyileştirmek için “ IC Kuşağı ” staj programı ile tüm şirketlerimizde staj süreci yapılandırılmış ve standardize edilmiştir.

Staj programımız ile amacımız;
üniversitelerin 3. ya da 4. sınıf öğrencilerine , zorunlu stajları kapsamında, kendilerini ve yetkinliklerini gösterebilecekleri gerçek bir iş deneyimi yaşatmak ve işe alım süreçlerimizde öncelikli olarak kendilerini istihdam etmektir.

IC Kuşağı Staj Programı başvuruların toplanması ile başlar. Ardından ön elemeden geçen adaylara yetenek testi gönderilir ve birebir mülakatlar yapılır. Mülakatlar sonucunda yetkinlik ve pozisyonlara uygunluklarına göre stajyerlerimiz ilgili şirket ve departmanlara yerleştirilir.

Staj sürecinde stajyerlerimizin geri bildirimleri de bizler için önemli olup; her stajyerimize bir insan kaynakları iş ortağı atanır. Staj sürecimiz karşılıklı değerlendirme ve anketler ile tamamlanır. Stajını başarı ile tamamlayan stajyerlerimiz yetenek havuzuna alınarak uzun dönem staj için değerlendirilir ve “ Yeni Mezun Geliştirme Programı ”na dahil edilir.

“ Yeni Mezun Geliştirme Programı ”nı başarı ile tamamlayan uzun dönem stajyerler, açık kadroların oluşması durumunda öncelikli değerlendirmeye alınarak işe alımları yapılır.

listings.title: - Lead Yourself with LC Waikiki Coaching Programı - TalentScore | Youthall
listings.description:
Okula başladığın gün daha dün gibi aklındayken mezuniyetin için geri saymaya başladın bile, zaman ne kadar çabuk geçiyor değil mi?

Mezun olmaya adım adım yaklaşırken, bu yolu emin adımlarla yürümek istersen LC Waikiki olarak Lead Yourself with LC Waikiki Coaching Programı'mız ile yanındayız!

Lead Yourself with LC Waikiki Coaching Programı ile;

- LC Waikiki Koçları arasından belirlenen koçun ile düzenli olarak online ve birebir görüşmeler gerçekleştirebilecek,
- Kendini geliştirmek istediğin konulara odaklanabilecek,
- Koçunun desteğiyle kariyer hedeflerini belirleyerek kendi rotanı çizebileceksin.

Daha fazlası da var...

Program süresi boyunca* " Lider Oturumları " etkinliğimiz ile, LC Waikiki liderlerinin katılımıyla gerçekleşecek olan online buluşmalara katılabileceksin. Bu buluşmalarda liderlerimizin kariyer hikayesini, iş hayatına dair deneyimlerini öğrenme ve sorularını sorma şansına sahip olacaksın.

Sorumluluklar

Koçların ile planladığın birebir görüşmelere ve Lider Oturumları'na düzenli olarak katılmanı bekliyoruz.

Aranan Nitelikler

- Üniversite son sınıf öğrencisiysen,
- Yeni şeyler öğrenmekten ve kendini geliştirmekten keyif alıyorsan,
- Mezuniyet yolculuğunda LC Waikiki'nin desteği ile ilerlemek istiyorsan başvurunu bekliyoruz!
- Programımız kontenjanlarla sınırlıdır.

listings.title: - TechVenture Genç Yetenek Programı - TalentScore | Youthall
listings.description:
TechVenture Genç Yetenek Programı ile seni teknoloji dünyasında seni eğitim ve gelişim dolu bir maceraya davet ediyoruz!

Teknoloji dünyasında fark yaratmaya ve geleceği birlikte inşa etmeye ne dersin?

Dünyanın dört bir yanında 1300'ün üzerinde mağazamız ve 60 ülkedeki güçlü varlığımızla, "İyi Giyinmek Herkesin Hakkı" felsefesini benimseyerek büyük bir yolculuğa çıkıyoruz. Moda dünyasının ötesinde, teknoloji ve dijital dönüşüm alanlarında da önemli hedeflere koşuyoruz.
LC Waikiki Dijital Dönüşüm ve Bilgi Teknolojileri Departmanı olarak 900’den fazla uzmanla, inovasyonu ve iş birliğini ön planda tutarak geleceği şekillendiriyoruz. Agile/Scrum metodolojileri ile her gün daha verimli ve dinamik bir ekip haline geliyoruz.

Neden Bizimle Olmalısın?

Biz, dijital dönüşüm ve teknoloji dünyasında enerjik, yenilikçi ve dinamik bir ekibiz!
TechVenture Genç Yetenek Programı ile geleceğin liderlerini ve uzmanlarını yetiştirmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Bu programda sadece kendini geliştirmekle kalmayacak, aynı zamanda teknoloji sektöründe tecrübe kazandıracak harika fırsatlar da yakalayacaksın.

Kimleri Arıyoruz?

- 2024/2025’te mezun olmuş/olacak ya da yüksek lisans/doktora öğrencisiysen,

- İngilizcen ileri seviyede ve rahatça iletişim kurabiliyorsan,

- İstanbul’da yaşıyor veya İstanbul’a taşınabilecek durumdaysan,

- Tam zamanlı çalışmayı istiyorsan,

- Hibrit ya da ofis ortamında çalışmak senin için uygunsa,

- Teknoloji ve dijital dönüşüm senin tutkun ve bu alanda bir fark yaratmak istiyorsan,

- Analitik düşünme, problem çözme gibi becerilerin varsa,

- Takım çalışmasına uygun, iletişimde güçlü ve proaktifim diyorsan,

O zaman bu maceraya seni de davet ediyoruz.

TechVenture Genç Yetenek Programı’nda Seni Neler Bekliyor?

Bu sadece bir iş değil, seni geliştirirken aynı zamanda kariyerine sağlam bir temel atmanı sağlayacak bir program! Dijital dönüşümün ve teknoloji dünyasının derinliklerine dalacak, hem teknik hem de liderlik becerilerini geliştirerek kendini geleceğe hazırlayacaksın.

Gelişimini desteklemek için mentorluk programı ve yepyeni bilgiler edineceğin projelerde aktif rol alma fırsatları bu programda! Ayrıca;

- Dinamik ve destekleyici bir ekip,

- Eğlenceli ve yenilikçi projelerle deneyim kazanma,

- Kişisel ve profesyonel gelişim fırsatları,

- Hibrit/Ofis çalışma düzeni,

- Liderlik ve teknik becerilerini geliştirme şansı ve çok daha fazlası da seni bekliyor.

Aşağıdaki ekiplerde birlikte çalışmak için seni bekliyoruz:

- Yazılım

- RPA

- ERP

- PMO

- Siber Güvenlik

- Büyük Veri Yönetimi ve Veri Mimarlığı

- İş Zekası

- Veri Analitiği

Hayalindeki kariyere adım atmak için macera burada başlıyor!

listings.title: Youthall: En İyi Şirketlerin İşe Alım ve Genç Yetenek Programları
listings.description: En iyi şirketlerin staj programları, online staj programları, genç yetenek programları ve işe alım programlarının başvuruları seni bekliyor. Hemen baş...

listings.title: Regional Supplier Development Manager
listings.description: Looking for a challenging new role and career development as a; SUPPLIER DEVELOPMENT MANAGER If the answer is yes, then Future Electronics wants to hear from you! We are currently looking to employ a Supplier Development Manager to join our EMEA team in Istanbul. We know our employees are what make us great, that's why we constantly develop and motivate our talent with world class organizational development to learn and achieve our goals together Successful applicants will gain a highly competitive salary, full training and a range of benefits. Job Outline: The prime responsibility of the EMEA Supplier Development Manager (SDM) is to ensure the successful execution of the business plan for their assigned focus suppliers. The SDM acts as the bridge to drive successful engagement between marketing, sales, engineering and the supplier. This will require driving a demand creation strategy with NPI and marcom activities on the key technologies of their suppliers. The SDM is the primary interface and facilitator to relationships between all key personnel at the suppliers and Future Electronics. The SDM will be expected to create the business plan, ensuring alignment with sales, marketing, engineering, the supplier and drive the execution with all associated parties. The primary metrics for success will be achieving the sales, demand creation and network share metrics set within the business plan. What the role involves: Hold principal accountability for success with assigned focus suppliers. Act as the primary lead within Future for the focus suppliers and ensure proactive alignment of distribution and market segment strategy. Develop a business plan with associated programmes, gain mindshare and acceptance from the organisation and drive success across the EMEA organisation. Control and communicate NPI to all relevant parties, including Sales, Marketing, Engineering and management. Communicate supplier strengths, product offerings, roadmaps and strategies effectively across the EMEA organisation in order to target specific / strategic customers where requested. Work with the technical and Marcom teams to develop and execute on demand creation programmes, including driving the launch and co-ordination of new product offerings. Provide enablers (demos & Marcom material) for product push programmes. Develop business relationships to a level that will support Future gaining the ‘unfair’ advantage through supplier relationship and matrix development. Develop tools to track and monitor performance, measure and communicate successes and drive improvements / product push programmes where needed. Do you have : Ideally educated to degree level with comprehensive knowledge of electronics and / or electronic distribution across a region or countries. Fully au fait with the sales and marketing working practises of Future and EMEA / international distributor. Commercially astute with strong credibility, able to win the “customer” and develop long term customer relationship management. Able to think strategically and implement tactical plans as required. Strong service ethic able to work on own or as core support to others. Proactive, adaptable, organised and multi-tasking achiever. Excellent verbal and written communicator and presenter. About Us : Founded in 1968, Future Electronics is a worldwide leader in electronic components distribution and is recognized as one of the most respected and innovative companies in the industry today. Headquartered in Montreal and operating in over 160 locations in 40 plus countries around the world, Future Electronics has earned an impressive reputation for providing outstanding service and developing efficient, comprehensive global supply chain solutions. On April 2nd, 2024, Future Electronics joined WT Microelectronics. This complementary partnership is expected to generate strong synergies, enabling the combined company to deliver long-term, sustainable value to all stakeholders, including customers, suppliers, employees, and shareholders. Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion We are committed to Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion. We recruit the ‘best person for the job’ regardless of age, race, colour, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, or disability creating an inclusive working environment and culture for all our employees. Show more Show less

listings.title: Global Category Supply Planning Executive
listings.description: Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayat’s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. This role is pivotal in managing Hayat's global supply chain planning. The ideal candidate will possess a blend of analytical and communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with various functions at all levels. Success in this role will depend on strategic thinking, attention to detail, and proactive management of supply chain dynamics. This role will be part of the global supply chain organization and report to the global category supply planning group manager. Responsibilities Coordinate Planning and Analysis : Oversee planning efforts and analyze existing materials, finished goods and new product launches across our global manufacturing network. Collaboration and Capacity Enhancement : Establish and nurture strong relationships with global procurement, manufacturing, other global functions and local supply chain organizations. Supply Chain Strategy Development : Analyze supply chain constraints and assist in formulating strategies to improve operational capacity. Product Launch Coordination : Coordinate the timing of product launches and inventory ramp-up plans with launch planning teams. Customer Service Excellence : Maintain high service levels for customers, ensuring minimal to no stockouts. Inventory optimization: Optimize inventory levels for the assigned category and ensure inventory numbers meet the target inventory levels. Minimize slow moving inventory and obsolete stocks. Collaboration with local planners : Work closely with local production planners to ensure a consistent supply of finished goods and raw materials. Qualifications Minimum 7 years of “supply chain planning” experience Experience in FMCG or a similar industry, experience in hygiene industry is preferred. University degree in engineering Understanding of sales and operations planning process and experience in managing supply reviews as part of the S&OP cycle. Exceptional interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills, with the ability to engage with all organizational levels. Focus on the quality of work and continuous process improvement. Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel and PowerPoint. Prior experience with SAP MM , MRP , PP/DS and SAP IBP (preferred). Fluency in English is required. What We Offer You Private Health Insurance Employee Shuttle Service Meal Voucher / Canteen Monthly Employee Support Package (Assortment of Hayat Products or Food Package) Monthly Internet Allowence Baby Diaper Support (For Children Up to 4 Years Old) and Diaper Support (for 1st Degree Relatives of Employees) 3 Days of Administrative Paid Leave Per Year Heating and Eid Allowance Once a Year Award & Recognition Programs FLEX: Flexible Benefits Program Wezone: Rewards and Recognition Program Seniority Award Support Heltia: Employee Assistance Program At Hayat, we conduct fair and inclusive hiring processes. We do not tolerate prejudice or discrimination based on language, religion, ethnicity, race, age or gender. Our recruitment process is solely based on the alignment with the job description, measurable and objective assessments, and competency-based interviews Get to know us Please visit us at the following addresses for any information you need: https://www.hayat.com/en-tr/ https://www.instagram.com/hayatkimya/ Clarification Text for Employee Candidate : https://www.hayat.com/aydinlatma-metni/aydinlatma-metni.htm Show more Show less

listings.title: Human Resources Intern
listings.description: Are you eager to build a career in Human Resources and ready to apply your theoretical knowledge in a real business environment? Join our HR team! The CMA CGM Group , a global leader in shipping and logistics, serves more than 420 ports around the world on five continents. Present in 160 countries through its network of more than 400 offices and 750 warehouses, the Group employs more than 155,000 people worldwide, including 4,000 in Marseilles where its head office is located. With its subsidiary CEVA Logistics, a world leader in logistics, and its air freight division CMA CGM AIR CARGO, the CMA CGM Group is continually innovating to offer its customers a complete and increasingly efficient range of new shipping, land, air, and logistics solutions. As a result of expanding our organization, we are looking for a Human Resources Intern to join our fast-growing and challenging organization. Please note: This internship is only open to students with a mandatory internship requirement approved by their university. Key Responsibilities: Support recruitment and onboarding processes, Assist with CV screening and interview scheduling, Take part in ongoing HR projects, Support internal communication and documentation tasks within the department, Assist with departmental purchases and invoice processing. What We’re Looking For: 3rd or 4th-year university students from relevant departments (Psychology, Business Administration, HR Management, etc.), University approval for a mandatory internship is required, Good command of English, both verbal and written, Available to work full-time in the summer period at the office in Istanbul, Strong communication skills, Problem-solving and adaptability in a dynamic work environment, Eager to learn. What We Offer: Real hands-on experience in a corporate environment A dynamic and supportive team Breakfast: every Monday morning Transportation (Shuttle) Meal allowance Happy hours Valuable learning and networking opportunities for your future career Come along on CMA CGM's adventure! Show more Show less

listings.title: First Gen Summer Intern - Logistics (İzmir Plant)
listings.description: Overview At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Pepsi, Doritos and Lipton Ice Tea, our work touches millions of people every day. At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve. Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you. First Gen is a two-month summer internship program, offering hands-on experience, dynamic learning and exciting networking opportunities. We are looking for a First Gen Summer Intern to join our Supply Chain team based in İzmir Plant . Our process consists of the following steps: Application: 13 March - 1 April Video Interview: 3 - 9 April Face-to-Face Assessment: 27 April - 12 May Internship: 1 July - 31 August Responsibilities Load and put-away process improvement study (using Lean methodology) Support warehouse capacity forecasting and projection work Support optimization through standard time studies Shift and line balancing study Qualifications 3rd or 4th year undergraduate student who have completed at least their 2nd year Fluent in both English and Turkish Available to work full-time in İzmir Plant between July 1 – August 31 Proficient in MS Office programs Highly motivated to learn, develop new skills, and grow in a dynamic environment Strong collaboration and communication skills Show more Show less

listings.title: Logistics Intern, Forward Program
listings.description: Autoliv, a global leader in automotive safety systems, is seeking a motivated Logistics Intern to join our Gebze plant. We manufacture and market airbags, seatbelts and steering wheels. This internship offers practical, hands‑on experience in logistics, inventory control and supply chain activities within a manufacturing environment. Key Responsibilities Support inbound and outbound logistics operations, including goods receiving, storage, picking and dispatch activities. Assist with inventory management tasks such as stock counts, reconciliation and cycle counting to ensure accuracy of ERP records. Collaborate with procurement, production and quality teams to coordinate material flow and ensure timely availability of components. Skills & Knowledge Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Proficient in MS Office applications (Word, Excel, Outlook) Familiarity with basic inventory and warehouse practices; experience with ERP or WMS is desirable but not essential Ability to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism Comfortable working both independently and as part of a team A motivated, solution‑oriented mindset with a strong willingness to learn Who Are We Looking For? 3rd year bachelor’s degree students studying Logistics, Supply Chain, Industrial Engineering, Business or related fields Available to work a minimum of3–4 days per week Previous internship or project experience in logistics, warehousing or manufacturing is desirable but not essential Interest in supply chain processes, inventory control and process optimisation 🌍 Equal Opportunities Autoliv is an inclusive employer and welcomes applications from candidates of all backgrounds. All qualified applicants are considered without regard to gender, identity, ethnicity, or ability. Role Location Kocaeli-Gebze Show more Show less

listings.title: Supply Chain Long Term Intern
listings.description: About Goodyear We’re dedicated to producing, innovating, and servicing the best tires in the world. For over 125 years, Goodyear has led the way in developing smart solutions that shape the future of mobility. Today, we’re one global team united by bold thinking, relentless drive, and a passion to exceed expectations. If you’re ready to embrace change and make an impact in your career, let’s go. Why This Role Matters As a Supply Chain Intern, you'll play a key role in our Supply Chain Team, supporting initiatives that help us deliver excellent service and strengthen customer relationships. What You'll Do Gain hands-on exposure to different areas of the Supply Chain organization, including Customer Contact, Customer Care, Key Account Management, and e-Business Solutions Work closely with the Customer Service Team Leader to support ongoing Customer Service initiatives and projects Assist the team with documentation, coordination, and daily operational activities Contribute to team reporting and help maintain organized records and data Support data gathering and process analysis to help identify opportunities for improvement and efficiency Collaborate with team members across functions to ensure smooth and responsive customer service What You'll Bring 2nd or 3rd year undergraduate student or a master’s student in Supply Chain, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field Availability to work at least 3 days per week Strong communication skills and a collaborative approach to problem solving Attention to detail and a willingness to learn in a supportive team environment Good command of written and spoken Turkish and English Proficiency in MS Office applications; familiarity with SAP is a plus Previous internship experience in Customer Service or related areas is a plus We welcome applicants from a wide range of backgrounds and experiences. Even if you don’t meet every listed qualification, we encourage you to apply. Goodyear is one of the world's largest tire companies. It employs about 68,000 people and manufactures its products in 51 facilities in 19 countries around the world. Its two Innovation Centers in Akron, Ohio, and Colmar-Berg, Luxembourg, strive to develop state-of-the-art products and services that set the technology and performance standard for the industry. For more information about Goodyear and its products, go to Goodyear.com. Goodyear is an equal employment opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic protected by law. Show more Show less

listings.description: Looking for Your Dream Job? Join The Magnum Ice Cream Company! Manufacturing Excellence Intern Location: Corlu Scope: Local The Magnum Ice Cream Company (formerly a division of Unilever) is now a standalone, independent, EUR 7.9 billion publicly listed company. We’re on a mission to create the ultimate snacking company. A place where growth, innovation, founder and ownership mentality, and performance are cultivated and rewarded. And where we craft extraordinary ice cream experiences - transforming ordinary moments into lasting memories. Because we know, life tastes better with ice cream. ABOUT ICE CREAM: Life Tastes Better With Ice Cream The Magnum Ice Cream Company is all about growth. Growing our business. Growing our customers’ businesses. Growing our people’s careers. Growth begins with empowerment. So we free our people to be innovative, responsible entrepreneurs, driven and equipped to give our consumers more amazing products and unforgettable moments – and having fun doing it. With 19.000 expert ice cream colleagues and iconic brands like Wall’s, Cornetto and Ben & Jerry’s, loved in 76 countries, we are the world’s largest Ice Cream company leading the industry. We have been taking pleasure seriously for more than 100 years, serving happiness with every lick or scoop of ice cream for generations. We are investing to unlock the full growth potential of The Magnum Ice Cream Company as a standalone entity, once we separate from Unilever, which is planned to happen before the end of 2025. We dream big but keep things simple to act fast. If you want to grow with us, make an impact, and shape the future of Ice Cream , this is the place for you! JOB PURPOSE: To minimize manual processes within current digital applications used in the Manufacturing Excellence department, streamline reporting processes (less NVAA), and strengthen the foundations of our digital transformation journey. This role is not only about reporting support; it also offers opportunities in process analysis, Local MES improvements, RCA applications, and gaining an ICMS perspective. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Analyze manual steps in digital reporting and MES data correction processes Support dashboarding & visualization using Power BI and MS Office Identify opportunities for automation, standardization, and NVAA reduction Contribute to RCA, Kaizen, and continuous improvement initiatives Improve MES data accuracy, data flow, and reporting structure Explore MES–Power BI integration opportunities Work closely with engineering & operations teams on digital improvements Experiences & Qualifications : WHAT YOU NEED TO SUCCEED: Graduated from or in the final year of an engineering program - Preffered Candidates from IT, Management Information Systems, Data Analytics, etc. will also be considered Intermediate knowledge of Power BI and MS Office (especially Excel) High interest in digital tools and working with data (digital awareness) Basic knowledge of Lean Manufacturing, WCM, or Six Sigma is a plus Strong analytical thinking skills Team-oriented with strong communication skills SKILLS Data analysis skills Stakeholder Management Good Communication and Presentation Cross functional understanding of business WHY JOIN US? Opportunity to learn the ICMS (Ice Cream Manufacturing System) culture and the Manufacturing Excellence approach on the shop floor Hands-on experience addressing real operational issues using RCA methodologies Contribute to enhancing the digital maturity of the Local MES system Play an active role in digital transformation projects Create real impact by optimizing reporting processes Gain experience in NVAA reduction and process streamlining Learn and apply Kaizen and continuous improvement culture Improve time management, prioritization, and planning skills Develop skills in analytical thinking, stakeholder management, and presentation A long-term and development-focused internship experience WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: A unique mix of global scale & start-up spirit—€8.3bn powerhouse with an agile, entrepreneurial mindset. We’re building a new high growth Ice Cream company from the ground up. Career without limits—42 markets, international opportunities, and fast tracked growth. A company that celebrates joy, innovation, and purpose—We create extraordinary careers, just like our ice cream creates extraordinary moments. listings.title: İK İş Ortağı
listings.description: Prometeon Turkey Endüstriyel ve Ticari Lastikler A.Ş. is a high-profile multinational group engaged in Tyres Sector. We are willing to work with professionals who want to make a career in Prometeon. Location will be in Kocaeli/Kartepe. The candidate will support the team in the following activities: Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (Business Administration, Industrial Engineering, Economics, Psychology, Labor Economics, etc.) • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in Human Resources, preferably as an HR Business Partner • Experience in white-collar and intern recruitment processes end-to-end • Experience in internal communication and employee engagement process • Knowledge of performance and talent management • Experience in Employer Branding activities and Young Talent programs • Strong communication skills with the ability to build effective relationships across all levels of the organization • Ability to analyze business needs and provide proactive HR solutions • Strong planning, organization and time management skills • Results-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving capability • Fluency in English • Proficient in MS Office applications • Knowledge of SAP HR is an asset • Capability of new digital tools and desire to learn Main Responsibilities • Act as the first point of contact for assigned functions (Sales, Marketing, Purchasing, Logistics, ICT, Finance and HR) and serve as a strategic HR Business Partner • Analyzing specific needs taken from employees correctly and finding solutions, ultimately increasing employee satisfaction • Support the company’s mission, vision, strategy, values, and policies across all areas of responsibility • Manage end-to-end white-collar recruitment processes and onboarding activities • Organizing the internal communication activities to increase employee motivation and engagement in line with the needs of the organization and beliefs. • Support performance and talent management processes in coordination with L&D and related stakeholders • Lead and implement Employer Branding activities to increase employer brand awareness and Young Talent Internship programmes • Working in coordination with Compensation & Benefits processes about salary offer preparation of new comers. • Support organizational development initiatives, including role definitions and responsibility frameworks • Prepare and monitor regular HR KPI reports (Employee Engagement, Performance Management, Recruitment Time, Turnover, Employer Brand Awareness) • Ensure compliance with applicable Quality Management Systems (ISO standards and related requirements) • Collaborate with regional/country HR teams to ensure functional alignment Required Competencies • Effective communication and relationship management • Planning and time management • Problem-solving mindset • Result-oriented approach • Teamwork and collaboration • Negotiation skills • Coaching mindset • Internal customer focus • Innovative and creative perspective Prometeon Tyre Group manufactures and sells tyres, especially for industry, transport of goods and passengers, and AGRO and OTR applications. Officially established in 2017 as a spin-off from the industrial division of Pirelli Tyre, Prometeon starts its path by producing and selling Pirelli branded tires. Nowadays, the company is progressively developing a multi-brand and multi-product approach, widening its technological expertise. There are more than 8000 people in the #PrometeonFamily The Group operates across the globe, with the Head Quarter Milan, four factories (Brazil, Egypt and Turkey), several commercial sites, and it is driven by principles of internationalism and multiculturalism. JOIN US! Show more Show less

listings.title: Konya IC Factory Process Engineer
listings.description: Looking for Your Dream Job? Join The Magnum Ice Cream Company! Konya IC Factory Process Engineer Function : Supply Chain Reports to: Production Manager | Supply Chain IC SU Konya IC Scope: Local Location: Konya IC Terms & Conditions: Full Time The Ice Cream division at Unilever is preparing to stand on its own, aiming to become an independent, EUR 8.3 billion publicly listed company by the end of 2025. We’re on a mission to create the ultimate snacking company. A place where growth, innovation, founder and ownership mentality, and performance are cultivated and rewarded. And where we craft extraordinary ice cream experiences - transforming ordinary moments into lasting memories. Because we know, life tastes better with ice cream. ABOUT THE MAGNUM ICE CREAM COMPANY: The Magnum Ice Cream Company is all about growth. Growing our business. Growing our customers’ businesses. Growing our people’s careers. Growth begins with empowerment. So we free our people to be innovative, responsible entrepreneurs, driven and equipped to give our consumers more amazing products and unforgettable moments – and having fun doing it. With 19.000 expert ice cream colleagues and iconic brands like Wall’s, Cornetto and Ben & Jerry’s, loved in 76 countries, we are the world’s largest Ice Cream company leading the industry. We have been taking pleasure seriously for more than 100 years, serving happiness with every lick or scoop of ice cream for generations. We are investing to unlock the full growth potential of The Magnum Ice Cream Company as a standalone entity, once we separate from Unilever, which is planned to happen before the end of 2025. We dream big but keep things simple to act fast. If you want to grow with us, make an impact, and shape the future of Ice Cream , this is the place for you! JOB PURPOSE Here is the place where you can bring your purpose to life with the work that you do – creating a better business and a better world. A Great Supply Chain is the key winning formula for every day's business world and supply chain is the spine of success in every company. If you are looking for a job where you will find a delightful combination of strategy, creativity and execution that changes the score of the game by creating value. If you are looking for team members with passion for success, ability and will to make use of change and to always win. We are an organization growing proudly with real value creation. Join us to add your mark to the list of “Made by You”. We are looking for a Process Engineer to work in our Factory located in Konya. WHAT WILL YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES BE Using engineering tools and analysis programs. Solving the process issues that causes loss of effectiveness through engineering way of working. Developing and define the working parameters for the processes. Focusing on development for error proof and full proof methodologies to eliminate the need for alignment and adjustment. Responsible for safety in the area and the occupational health of people work with. Taking responsibilities in design phase for new projects or any improvements. Responsible to put comments as supply chain part. Participate in conducting trial and industrial tests of new types of packaging materials, raw materials and finished products. Supporting innovation network meetings for new product launches in terms of technical know-how. Propose saving projects. Participating in projects to upgrade existing equipment, as well as purchase new ones. Participating / leading improvement projects, study WCM tools and apply them in practice in improvement projects. Identifying the causes of equipment malfunctions or defects. If necessary, take part in the repair, installation, dismantling, testing and adjustment of particularly complex units of equipment (units and machines) in cooperation with maintenance. Participating in the training of production operators. Developing and maintaining a reporting system and working documentation regarding the production process functionality. Developing and supporting production team to create and update WCM activity boards. Advising and supporting in cooperation with WCM coordinator, production staff on the application of WCM techniques. Participating in conducting internal meetings aimed at developing measures to prevent and eliminate non-conformities and reduce losses. Responsible for the validation of all process improvements and the establishment of revised basic conditions on the line. A core deliverable is to eliminate losses and wastes and increase the stability of the line to support the transition of traditional line teams to semi-autonomous teams. Experiences & Qualifications WHAT YOU WILL NEED TO SUCCEED University degree preferably in Mechanical Engineering Engineering with a strong understanding of manufacturing processes, safety, productivity and quality assurance. Ability of handling several projects simultaneously and meeting tight deadlines. Working effectively with different departments. Proficiency in MS Office applications Preferably no military obligation for male candidates. Skills Fluent in English & Turkish Good communication skills. Analytical thinking skills. Problem solving skills. Leadership You are energized by delivering fantastic results. You are an example to others – both your results and your resilience. You are constantly on the lookout for better ways to do things, engaging and collaborating with others along the way. As an individual you are the one responsible for your own wellbeing and delivering high standards of work. You must also focus on the Consumer and what they need. You are humble and have your head up, looking around to interpret evidence and data smartly, spot issues and opportunities to make things better. WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: A unique mix of global scale & start-up spirit—€8.3bn powerhouse with an agile, entrepreneurial mindset. We’re building a new high growth Ice Cream company from the ground up. Career without limits—42 markets, international opportunities, and fast tracked growth. A performance-driven culture—Freedom to act, disrupt and grow – your success is measured by impact. A company that celebrates joy, innovation, and purpose—We create extraordinary careers, just like our ice cream creates extraordinary moments. ADDITIONAL INFORMATION As publicly announced, Unilever will separate its Ice Cream business which is expected by the end of 2025. This role will transfer to the new Ice Cream company.
