listings.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Painting & Automation
listings.description: Unlock Your Potential at Eaton: Where Diversity Drives Innovation. No matter where you come from, your aspirations matter to us. We believe in the power of different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds to ignite innovation and drive success. We're in the business of empowering people, and that includes you. Your journey here is not just about a job; it's about a shared vision for a brighter, more sustainable future. Our site in Ankara offers a fantastic learning environment and a vibrant array of career opportunities spanning medium-voltage product design, manufacturing, and sales. Combining agile R&D with internationally recognized test facilities, our team has the resources, speed, and flexibility to adapt to any customer demand. We support utility providers and renewable energy projects, as well as commercial and residential buildings, with innovative and cost-effective solutions. We aspire to be an all-encompassing medium-voltage center of excellence. Our team is currently growing fast as we ramp up our ability to support crucial trends like Industry 4.0, electrification, and the energy transition. Our work is enabling more agile and energy-efficient manufacturing, as well as driving forward electrification and the transition to smarter power grids dominated by renewables — helping to create a more sustainable future. Our employees are passionate about continuously improving and reaching their full potential, as well as enabling our facility to do the same. We’re always seeking dedicated and adaptable people with skills spanning engineering, sales, marketing, R&D, and manufacturing. If you’re curious and love innovating to solve new challenges, join us! We are looking for a Manufacturing Engineer - Painting & Automation to be joining our team in the Transformer Business Unit. This role is based on site in Temelli. The Manufacturing Engineer plays a critical role in driving operational excellence across Eaton’s Ankara facility. This position supports the development and optimization of manufacturing processes, contributes to new product introductions (NPI), and leads continuous improvement initiatives. Key Responsibilities Process Optimization & Continuous Improvement Analyze and improve manufacturing processes to reduce waste, cycle time, and setup duration Apply Lean, Six Sigma, and TPM methodologies to enhance productivity and standardization Lead root cause analysis and implement mistake-proofing solutions using tools like 8D, A3, DOE, and 5-Why Support for New Product Introduction (NPI) & Strategic Projects Participate in the industrialization of new products using Eaton’s NPI framework Contribute to Strategic Transfer Projects (STP) and Value Analysis/Value Engineering (VAVE) initiatives Ensure manufacturability through Design for Manufacturing (DFM) principles and accurate cost modeling Manufacturing Technology & Digital Transformation Support implementation of CAD/CAM systems, NC programming, and inspection tools Assist in layout optimization using simulation tools and contribute to Industry 4.0 initiatives Evaluate and recommend new technologies aligned with capital investment strategies Safety, Quality & Compliance Promote and adhere to safety standards including lockout/tagout and ergonomic practices Participate in PFMEA reviews and implement robust error-proofing methods Ensure compliance with Eaton’s quality policies and environmental regulations Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with operations, supply chain, and quality teams to resolve issues and improve performance Provide technical support during customer visits and internal audits Contribute to capacity planning and layout improvements to support plant growth Deploy Eaton Business System and Eaton Continuous Improvement System tools to drive performance improvement and knowledge development. Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Materials, or Industrial Engineering (or equivalent). 5 years of professional applied experience in Transformers / Switchgear Manufacturing / Engineering Services. A minimum of 3–5 years of experience in manufacturing engineering or operations with exposure to painting technology and automation. Experience in transformer or switchgear manufacturing preferred. Familiarity with DFMEA, PFMEA, DFM, PPAP, and controlled processes. Exposure to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, AS9100, or QS 9000 standards is a plus. Proven experience with Lean and Six Sigma tools. Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. Experience with CAD/CAM systems and manufacturing simulation tools. Knowledge of Industry 4.0 technologies and digital workflows. Results-driven with a continuous improvement mindset. Strong communicator with the ability to present technical ideas clearly. Collaborative team player who thrives in cross-functional environments. Adaptable, optimistic, and proactive in facing challenges. Fluent level of English language is required, due to the international exposure. What We Offer Competitive compensation and benefits package Challenging projects in dynamic collaborative team We make your aspirations matter – Eaton encourages internal promotion, whenever possible We make your growth matter - We invest in our employees for the long term – not just with salary and benefits, but with ongoing learning and development opportunities made available through Eaton University We make your contributions matter - reliability, safety, efficiency, and sustainability are at the core of our dedication to improving people’s lives and the environment through power management technologies. We make your wellbeing matter – We put your health and safety first. Wellness at Eaton is more than a program, it’s about changing the environment by offering the right tools to help empower employees to make that happen. We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law. Show more Show less

listings.title: Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Sorumlusu
listings.description: EMS Erhan Makina, taşıma araçları imalatı alanında faaliyet gösteren, müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı ve sürekli iyileştirme anlayışıyla üretim yapan bir mühendislik firmasıdır. Kaliteyi yalnızca bir belge değil, üretim süreçlerinin ayrılmaz bir parçası olarak gören firmamız; ISO standartlarına uygun, sürdürülebilir ve disiplinli bir yönetim anlayışını benimsemektedir. Kalite yönetim sistemleri süreçlerinde görev alacak, üretimle iç içe çalışacak ve uzun vadede kalite yapımızın gelişimine katkı sağlayacak Kalite Sistemleri Sorumlusu arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Görev ve Sorumluluklar ISO kalite yönetim sistemleri kapsamında süreçlerin yürütülmesi ve takibi İç ve dış denetimlere hazırlık süreçlerinin planlanması ve koordinasyonu Kalite sistemleri kapsamında dokümantasyon, veri ve kayıt yönetiminin eksiksiz yürütülmesi Üretim süreçlerini, makineleri ve iş akışlarının sahada gözlemlenerek kalite sistemlerine entegre edilmesi Proseslere ilişkin iyileştirme fırsatlarının tespit edilmesine destek olunması Kalite sistemi gereklilikleri doğrultusunda ilgili diğer birimlerle koordineli çalışılması Aranan Nitelikler Makine Mühendisliği, Otomotiv Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği veya benzeri mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun Kalite sistemleri konusunda öğrenmeye istekli İngilizce okuma ve yazma becerisine sahip Bilgisayar ve ofis programlarını (özellikle Word, Excel) çok iyi düzeyde kullanabilen Dokümantasyon ve belge yönetimi konusunda titiz, düzenli ve sistematik çalışan Üretim ortamında aktif görev alabilecek, sahayı öğrenmeye istekli Öğrenmeye açık, gelişim odaklı ve uzun vadeli çalışma hedefi olan Yeni mezun adaylar değerlendirilecektir (üniversite döneminde staj veya iş deneyimi tercih sebebidir) Etimesgut, Eryaman, Sincan bölgelerinde ikamet eden adaylar tercih sebebidir Neden EMS Erhan Makina? Güçlü bir oryantasyon eğitimi ve kalite çalışmalarını sahada uygulama fırsatı Yeni mezunlar için güçlü bir öğrenme ve gelişim ortamı Uzun vadeli kariyer planlaması Disiplinli, sistematik ve mühendislik temelli çalışma kültürü Show more Show less

listings.title: Project Engineer
listings.description: Job Responsibilities 1. Conduct site surveys, construction drawing reviews, and material verification/management for overseas projects, and establish standardized technical documentation in compliance with project requirements. 2. Responsible for monitoring and guiding third-party installation teams in the mechanical installation of equipment, completing the installation, parameter optimization, and joint debugging of electrical systems to ensure compliance with delivery standards. Also supports project management work to guarantee the project is accepted on time and meets quality requirements. 3. Serve as the primary technical liaison between clients, partners, and internal teams. Conduct regular communications on project progress and service updates to ensure information transparency. 4. Deliver product operation and maintenance training to clients. Provide on-site production support as needed, and perform after-sales service work such as equipment operation and maintenance, troubleshooting, hotline response and technical guidance in accordance with contract requirements. 5. Strengthen on-site client relationships to continuously improve customer satisfaction. 6. Timely handle and accurately execute other work tasks assigned by departments and superiors. Qualifications 1. Academic background in Mechatronics or Electrical Engineering. 2. Valid electrician license (construction/maintenance type is preferred) with more than 2 years of experience in mechatronic equipment troubleshooting and repair. 3. Proficiency in interpreting electrical schematics, skilled in operating test instruments, and familiar with PLC programming (e.g., Siemens S7-1200/1500). 4. Excellent problem-solving skills, customer requirement - oriented mindset, ability to optimize workflows proactively. 5. Flexible and efficient teamwork ability, strong time management skills, able to accept urgent tasks and strictly abide by safety regulations. 6. English proficiency as a working language, readiness for international business travel, and familiar with cross-cultural communication skills. Show more Show less

listings.title: Overseas Technical Procurement Engineer
listings.description: İGA Istanbul Airport, The largest infrastructure project in the history of the Republic of Türkiye, began operations on October 29, 2018. Türkiye’s gateway to the world , the airport continues its operations as a significant global hub , connecting the Asian, African, and European continents. Built on an area of 76.5 million square meters, the airport has a terminal serving 90 million passengers, with a planned total capacity of 200 million. İGA Istanbul Airport, honored by Skytrax as the “Best Airport of 2023,” “World’s Best Airport Shopping Experience,” and “Most Family-Friendly Airport,” and by ACI as Europe’s “Best Airport Over 40 Million Passengers,” “Most Enjoyable,” and “Cleanest,” continues to set global standards. At İGA, we believe every individual is unique, yet united by a shared vision and passion. Guided by our strategic goals and strong work ethic, we strive to move forward every day.If you aspire to be part of this proud and unique journey, we are looking for a talented ‘’Overseas Technical Procurement Engineer’’ to join us at the “meeting point” of the world. Your Journey Begins With a Unique Role ✈️ Conduct market research for machinery, equipment and spare parts procurement in domestic and international markets and develop the most suitable solutions based on organizational needs, Establish and develop relationships with domestic and international suppliers, Collect quotations, conduct technical and commercial evaluations and analyses, Lead supplier negotiations and finale contract processes, Monitor customs and foreign trade processes, manage import and export operations in compliance with legal regulations, Manage purchase and procurement processes via SAP, Prepare cost analyses and reports to provide data-driven insights. Proudly Show Your Skill to the World 🌍 Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field (preferably Mechanical Engineering or Industrial Engineering), Experience in machinery, equipment, and spare parts procurement processes, Knowledge of foreign trade and import operations and familiarity with related processes. Proficient in research and procurement processes in international markets, Knowledgeable about foreign trade regulations and customs processes, Experience in quotation analysis, supplier negotiation and contract management Excellent command of MS Office and SAP programs, Advanced level of competency in English, Willing to engage in communication and sharing among colleagues, Always setting the bar higher for oneself and the team with a continuous improvement mindset, What Awaits You in İGA 💎 You can benefit from Private Health Insurance, You can enjoy the privileges of your foreign language skills with Foreign Language Allowance! The İGA family is growing more with your inclusion, and our little İGA members can benefit from daycare support until they reach 68 months-old! You can benefit from many different stores and services provided at İGA Istanbul Airport! You can benefit from discounted prices and privileges through our collaborations with many leading brands! You can enjoy a variety of delicious meals in our cafeterias at the Airport and İGA Campus! With İGA Academy, which has won numerous awards globally, you can participate in many programs supporting your individual and career development both domestically and/or internationally! Our shuttles are waiting for you within a maximum distance of 1 km! With a total of 12,000 users and 300 service vehicles, you can benefit from our service network reaching all points of Istanbul except for the Adalar and Şile! At İGA, you can interact with colleagues who share your passions and interests, become part of our vibrant social clubs and create memories beyond the workplace! You can win surprise gifts through various contests and draws, With the orientation program at İGA, along with the support of your Buddy, you can learn and grow to feel in a unique experience! Celebrate your new age with joy at the monthly organized birthday parties at İGA! With the privileges provided by İGA Pass, you can have a unique pre-flight experience! You can explore it beforehand by clicking here now: https://www.igapass.com/tr İGA is inclusive with all its diverse colors. Coming from different cultural backgrounds and having unique competencies; the comfort of our colleagues who stand against obstacles is more precious than anything! Your personal data, which you will convey through LinkedIn, is processed within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law for the purposes specified in the Information Text that can be accessed via this link : " https://www.igairport.com/tr/insan-kaynaklari/kariyer-firsatlari ." The processed personal data is limited to the data you share only. By applying for the relevant job posting, you approve that your resume, when submitted, will be processed for the purposes stated in the Information Text, and if a suitable position opens, it may be transferred to the Company's group companies and business partners, and may also be processed by these companies for the purpose of recruitment. Show more Show less

listings.title: Future Squad Kısa Dönem Staj Programı 2026
listings.description: Future Squad bildiğin staj programlarından değil! Çünkü Future Squad Staj Programı, sadece bir iş deneyimi değil; etki yaratmak demek! Gerçek projelerde yer almak, fikirlerinle fark yaratmak ve sınırsız gelişim fırsatlarıyla tanışmak demek. Sen de bu dünyanın bir parçası olmak istiyorsan hadi hemen başvurunu yap ve Future Squad’lı olma yolunda ilk adımını at! Future Squad Staj Programı’nda seni neler bekliyor? 2 ay sürecek staj deneyimi ile alanında uzman Yapı Kredi Teknolojililerden işin inceliklerini öğrenebilirsin. Gerçek bir deneyim kazanarak iş hayatına bir adım önde başlayabilirsin. Future Squad’a özel hazırlanan çok yönlü gelişim programlarıyla farklı yetkinlikleri geliştirebilir, yepyeni şeyler keşfedebilirsin. Staj sürecinde Yapı Kredi Teknoloji’de hangi pozisyonlarda yer alabilirsin? Yazılım Mühendisi Stajyeri İş Analisti Stajyeri Ar-Ge Mühendisi Stajyeri Güvenlik Mühendisi Stajyeri Network Mühendisi Stajyeri Sistem Mühendisi Stajyeri Süreç ve Proje Yönetimi Stajyeri UX – UI Design Stajyeri Yapay Zeka ve Veri Yönetişimi Stajyeri Peki biz senden neler bekliyoruz? Üniversitede Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, İşletme Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği, Elektrik ve Elektronik Mühendisliği bölümlerinde 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrencisiysen, İyi derecede İngilizce biliyorsan, Hem öğrenmekten hem de takım olarak üretmekten keyif alıyorsan, Keşfetmenin gücüne inanıyorsan Future Squad’lı olmanı dört gözle bekliyoruz! Future Squad’lı olmanın başka güzel yanları da var; 📖 Yapı Kredi Akademi ile sınırsız gelişim 💻 Uzaktan çalışma fırsatı 💼 Stajın ardından Yapı Kredi ve Yapı Kredi Teknoloji’de kariyer fırsatları 🍝 TokenFlex dijital yemek kartı 🐾 Yapı Kredi Gönüllüleri ile dahil olabileceğin sosyal sorumluluk projeleri 🏀 20 farklı spor dalında faaliyet gösteren Yapı Kredi Spor Kulübü 🎭 Yapı Kredililerin sosyal kulübü BizClub ile birçok kültür-sanat etkinliğine indirimli bilet alma fırsatı 💜7/24 ulaşabileceğin çalışan destek hattıyla, psikolojik, hukuki ve finansal alanlarda ücretsiz danışmanlık 🎂 Doğum günü izni 🏢 Koç Topluluğu Spor Kulübü, Koç Akademi eşliğinde Koçlu olmanın ayrıcalıklı dünyası, …ve çok daha fazlası! Hadi hemen başvurunu yap ve Future Squad’lı olma yolunda ilk adımını at! Süreç Adımları 1) Online Başvuru - Öz geçmiş değerlendirme 2) Online Değerlendirme - Genel Yetenek Testi - İngilizce Testi - Alan Tercihi & Teknik Test 3) Online Mülakat 4) Kişilik Envanteri 5) İlk İş Günü (6 Temmuz 2026) Hakkımızda Yapı Kredi Teknoloji olarak finans sektöründe yenilikçi, yüksek kaliteli ve katma değeri yüksek ürünler ve çözümler üreten bir teknoloji şirketiyiz. 2000’den fazla çalışanımızla, Yapı Kredi Bankası için sektöre yön verecek ürünler geliştiriyor, modern mimari sistemler ve bulut teknolojilerini kullanarak sınırları kaldıran teknolojilerin yeri olma yolunda ilerliyoruz. #BurasıGeleceğinBaşladığıYer Show more Show less

listings.title: Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer - Havacı Kadınlar Uzun Dönem Staj Programı
listings.description: Yenilikçi ve öncü projelerde yer alarak başarılı bir kariyer hedefliyorsan, uzun dönem staj programımız Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer tam sana göre! Üniversitelerin 4. sınıfında eğitimine devam eden ve kariyerine güçlü bir başlangıç yapmak isteyen kadın öğrencileri , uzun dönem staj programımız Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza bekliyoruz! Eğer iyi bir takım oyuncusuysan, analitik bir bakış açısına sahipsen ve yeteneklerini geliştirmek istiyorsan; Ar-Ge veya İnsan Kaynakları alanlarında deneyim kazanabileceğin Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza başvurunu gerçekleştirebilirsin. Geleceğin profesyonelleriyle birlikte üretmek ve gelişmek için seni de aramızda görmek istiyoruz. Eğer sen de: Üniversitelerin Makine Mühendisliği, Uçak Mühendisliği, Uzay Mühendisliği, Havacılık ve Uzay Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik/Haberleşme Mühendisliği, Mekatronik Mühendisliği, Kontrol Mühendisliği, Malzeme/Metalurji Mühendisliği, Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya, İktisat, İşletme, İstatistik, Uluslararası İlişkiler, Siyaset Bilimi ve Kamu Yönetimi, Psikoloji, Sosyoloji, İletişim bölümlerinde öğrenciysen, 2025 - 2026 eğitim – öğretim döneminde 4.sınıfta öğrenim görüyorsan, Çok iyi derecede yazılı ve sözlü İngilizce biliyorsan, Milli projelerde gurur veren başarılara sahip olabilmek için Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza hemen başvur! Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programında: Elektrik Elektronik Kontrol ve Gömülü Sistemler (Kontrol – Aviyonik – Donanım - Kablaj Tasarım Geliştirme - Yazılım Geliştirme - Yazılım Doğrulama) Malzeme ve Proses Geliştirme - Havacılık İtki Sistemleri için Malzemeler Mekanik - Yapısal Tasarım - Aerodinamik Tasarım, HAD ve Yanma - Gerilme ve Ömür Analizleri - Termal Sistemler ve Soğutma Sistem Mühendisliği - Sistem Entegrasyon - Sistem Emniyeti ve RMT - Uçuşa Elverişlilik ve Sertifikasyon - Validasyon – Enstrümantasyon - Motor Performans İnsan Kaynakları - Kurumsal İletişim Alanlarından birinde uzun dönem stajını yapabilirsin. Başvurunun Uygun Bulunması Durumunda Değerlendirme Sürecinde Seni Neler Bekliyor? Başvuru formu Genel yetenek – yabancı dil testi – video mülakat Teknik ve İK departman görüşmeleri Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer Programında Seni Neler Bekliyor? 11 ay boyunca ilham verici bir kampüste, çalışma arkadaşlarımızın ekiplerinde yer alarak iş hayatını deneyimleme, Kariyer gelişimini destekleyecek mentorluk programında yer alma, Kişisel ve profesyonel gelişimini destekleyen çeşitli eğitimlere katılma, Başarılı bir staj dönemi sonrası işe alım sürecine dahil olma fırsatı *LinkedIn üzerinden başvuru butonuna tıkladıktan sonra yönlendirileceğiniz sayfada başvurunuzu tamamlamanız gerekmektedir.Başvuru yalnızca form doldurulduktan sonra geçerli olacaktır. Aşağıdaki linke tıklayarak işe alım süreçlerimizde işlenen kişisel veri faaliyetlerine ilişkin detaylar hakkında aydınlatma metnine erişerek bilgi alabilirsin. https://www.tei.com.tr/kisisel-verilerin-korunmasi Gökyüzüne kalıcı bir iz bırakmaya var mısın? listings.title: Denetim Uzmanı/Kıdemli Uzman (Bilgi Teknolojileri)
listings.description: 2014 yılında kurulan Param , Bankacılık Düzenleme ve Denetleme Kurumu'ndan (BDDK) lisans alarak Türkiye'nin ilk lisanslı elektronik para kuruluşu oldu. Param grup şirketleriyle birlikte elektronik para, ön ödemeli kartlar, fiziksel, sanal ve cep POS sistemleri, e-cüzdan, issuing, acquiring, processing, BNPL, online tahsilat, açık bankacılık gibi çeşitli finansal teknoloji çözümleri ile hem bireysel hem de kurumsal müşterilerine uçtan uca hizmet veriyor. Avrupa İmar ve Kalkınma Bankası (EBRD), CEECAT Capital, Alpha Associates ve Revo Capital’ın katıldığı ilk turda 217 milyon dolar değerleme üzerinden yatırım alan Param, sektöründe öncü bir rol üstleniyor. Yolculuğumuza gücümüze güç katarak devam ederken, dinamik çalışma ortamımızın bir parçası olacak, heyecanını ve deneyimini bizlerle paylaşacak Denetim Uzman/Kıdemli Uzman arıyoruz. GENEL NİTELİKLER Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği, Bilişim Sistemleri Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, İşletme Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri vb. bölümlerinden veya denkliği yetkili makamlarca tanınmış yurtdışı üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun olmak, 4 yıldan az olmamak üzere; bilgi teknolojileri/bilgi sistemleri denetiminde tecrübeli olmak, İyi seviyede İngilizce bilmek, Erkek adaylar için askerlik görevini tamamlamış olmak, Ankara’da ikamet etmek veya edebilecek durumda olmak, Seyahat engeli bulunmamak, ISACA ITAF, COBIT, ITIL vb. çerçeveler ve BT yönetişim standartları hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, Tercihen CISA, CISM, CRISC vb. sertifikalara sahip olmak. İŞİN TANIMI Şirket faaliyetlerinin Kanun ve ilgili diğer mevzuat ile şirket içi strateji, politika, ilke ve hedefler doğrultusunda yürütülüp yürütülmediğini belirlemek ve sistemlerin etkinliğini ve yeterliliğini değerlendirmek üzere denetimler yapmak, Tecrübe ve bilgisi doğrultusunda denetim süreçlerinin yürütülmesinde uygun roller almak ve gerekli durumlarda ilgili denetim ekibinin yönetilmesi ve koordine edilmesine yönelik sorumluluklar üstlenmek, Bilgi sistemleri yönetimine ilişkin faaliyetlerin politika, düzenleme ve genel kabul görmüş ilgili uluslararası standartlara uyumlu olup olmadığını değerlendirmek, Şirket bünyesindeki bilgi teknolojilerine bağlı süreçlere ve doğrudan bilgi sistemlerinin güvenliğine (gizlilik, bütünlük ve erişilebilirlik) yönelik denetimleri etkin ve katma değer yaratacak şekilde yürütmek, Bilgi Teknolojileri denetim ekiplerinde aktif şekilde yer almak ve aktif görev üstlenmek, Denetim ön çalışma, saha çalışması ve raporlama süreçlerindeki görev ve sorumluluklarını yerine getirmek, ekibi ve ekip liderini desteklemek, BT süreçlerine dair riskleri tespit etmek ve iç kontrol noktalarını değerlendirmek, Denetim çalışmaları kapsamında, denetim amacına uygun, sonuç almaya yönelik, tekrar edilebilir denetim testleri tasarlamak / uygulamak ve gerekli analizleri gerçekleştirmek, Excel, R, python vb. araçlarla verileri analiz etmek ve bu dillerde denetim/kontrol/analiz prosedürleri (kod parçaları ve/veya makrolar) oluşturmak, Denetim çalışma kağıtlarını ve raporlarını zamanında ve eksiksiz hazırlamak. Gerekli durumlarda İç Kontrol Birimi, Risk Yönetimi Birimi ve ilgili iş birimleriyle koordineli çalışmak, Denetim sonucunda Üst Yönetime/Denetim Komitesine sunulmak üzere zamanlı ve kaliteli raporlar hazırlamak, Denetim sonuçlarının, raporlarda yer alan bulguların, önerilerin ve aksiyon planlarının takibini yaparak izleme süreçlerini yürütmek, gerekiyorsa izleme saha testleri yapmak ve sonuçları raporlamak, İç Denetim Yönetmeliğinin oluşturulması ve güncel tutulması çalışmalarına katkı sağlamak, Kurumsal süreçlerle uyumlu ve kapsayıcı bir denetim evreninin oluşturulması çalışmalarına destek olmak, İç Denetim kaynaklarının katma değer yaratacak alanlarda etkin kullanımını sağlamak amacıyla gerçekleştirilen makro risk analizlerine katkı vermek, Risk analizi sonuçlarına ve Denetim Komitesi görüş ve talimatlarına dayalı denetim plan ve programlarının oluşturulmasına katkı sağlamak, Denetim plan ve programlarına uygun şekilde denetim faaliyetlerini icra etmek ve denetim raporlarının İç Denetim Yöneticisi aracılığıyla Denetim Komitesine sunulmasına yardımcı olmak, Denetim faaliyetlerini özellikle İç Kontrol Birimi ve Risk Yönetimi Birimi başta olmak üzere ilgili tüm birimlerle koordineli şekilde yürütmek, Dış denetim faaliyetlerinin koordinasyonunu sağlamak. Detaylar için; Ziyaret et: https://param.com.tr/ Bizi Linkedln’den takip et: https://www.linkedin.com/company/paramcomtr/ Bizi Instagram’dan takip et: https://www.instagram.com/param.com.tr/ Bizi X’den takip et: https://x.com/paramcomtr “Param’da seni bekleyen ayrıcalıklar!” 🚗 Yol Desteği 🍽️ Yemek Desteği 🏥 Sana Özel Sağlık Sigortası 🎂 Doğum Günü İzni 🎁 Welcome Kit 👋 Buddy Süreci 💻 ParamHub ile Eğitimler 🍹 Eğlence Molası 💳 ParamKart 🏆 Param’lının Avantajları 🌟 Referans Ödülü 📚 Karne ve İlk Okul Günü İzinleri 👶 Minik aile üyelerine 'hoş geldin' hediyesi! 🎙️ Söz Sende "6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında işlenen kişisel verileriniz ile ilgili detaylı bilgilendirmeye https://hr.param.com.tr/tr/aydinlatma-metni adresinde yer alan aydınlatma metnimizden ulaşabilirsiniz." listings.title: Project Engineer
listings.description: Job Description Are You Ready to Make It Happen at Mondelēz International? Join our Mission to Lead the Future of Snacking. Make It With Pride. You assist in planning, developing and execution of capital projects, technical development, feasibility perspectives of engineering-related activities in the supply chain and capital-expense project execution to support growth, world-class manufacturing and productivity with the highest level of quality, safety and environmental requirements. You help ensure sure that Mondelēz business and innovation processes in project management and Mondelēz standards in execution are followed. How You Will Contribute The role supports capital project execution, and you will be accountable for the quality of the results and execution of capital projects using Mondelēz standards, and business and innovation processes in project management. You will help define and deliver the capital and technical agenda during the development phase of capital investments with stakeholders so that accurate budgets, plans and fit-for-purpose technical solutions are provided and develop the capital budget according to the contract and forecast cash flow. You will also help ensure that applicable engineering developments and standards are properly implemented, and support the development and implementation of state-of-the-art processes and equipment strategies to optimize resources, harmonize assets and rollout best practices. What You Will Bring A desire to drive your future and accelerate your career. You will bring experience and knowledge in: Engineering or operations Working effectively and under pressure to meet deadlines Analysis Project management Proposing and providing the best technical solutions for all processes undertaken. Performing pre-engineering and technical project management processes with cost calculations, expenditure planning, and CPS-time plans. Preparing capital allocation requests according to relevant guidelines and regulations and managing the approval processes (AR Request and Approval Processes). Ensuring investment projects are executed within the determined financial budget, in line with defined clear objectives and company procedures, and coordinating relevant project teams. Collaborating with the purchasing department to obtain and evaluate bids and present the most suitable technical solution proposal, ensuring cost-effective project solutions. Collaborating with the Purchasing and Legal departments for contract preparation, providing technical requirements and all relevant details. Recommending selected suppliers to the Purchasing Department to obtain the best technology. After AR approval, coordinating the design, procurement, installation, and commissioning processes of new equipment, ensuring the timely and vertically launched (VSU) commissioning of new technical equipment and building projects. To ensure project execution within the agreed timeline and budget, and to prepare all necessary reports within the area of responsibility and monitor the project implementation process. Coordinates the procurement, installation, and commissioning of new projects and equipment in collaboration with manufacturing and R&D. Ensures that project costs are monitored and reported in accordance with company guidelines and requirements. As the project leader, ensures that all meetings and necessary communications with the project team are conducted effectively and closely monitors the equipment and material procurement, testing, and shipment processes throughout all phases of the project. Takes proactive measures against potential delays and risks. Proposes and implements ideas to reduce inventory and costs, and to improve production volume and export potential. Together with the Business Development Manager, transforms business needs into engineering projects aimed at improving and increasing the efficiency of production processes in the facility/factory. Relocation Support Available? No Relocation support available Business Unit Summary We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! Our people make all the difference in our succes Mondelēz International is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or preference, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Excited to grow your career? We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! IF YOU REQUIRE SUPPORT TO COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION OR DURING THE INTERVIEW PROCESS, PLEASE CONTACT THE RECRUITER Job Type Regular Project Engineering Science & Engineering Show more Show less

listings.title: GET Rotational Engineer
listings.description: We supply the sustainable and innovative paints and coatings that our customers, communities – and the environment – are increasingly relying on. Our world class portfolio of brands – including Dulux, International, Sikkens and Interpon – is trusted by customers around the globe. We’re active in more than 150 countries and have set our sights on becoming the global industry leader. It’s what you’d expect from a pioneering paints company that’s committed to science-based targets and is taking genuine action to address globally relevant challenges and protect future generations. For more information please visit www.akzonobel.com. © 2023 Akzo Nobel N.V. All rights reserved. Job Purpose The Graduate Engineering Trainee (GET) development program opens the way to an international career in the Integrated Supply Chain area and prepares you to play key roles at AkzoNobel in managerial or experts’ positions. The GET program was created for engineers who are looking for opportunities to gain knowledge and experience in an international environment as to engineering career and after ready to take up professional challenges abroad. After completion of the first stage of the program in Turkey, you will be deployed to another factory within AkzoNobel in EMEA region. At the end of the graduate program, based on readiness and performance, you will be assigned a final role in discussion with the regional ISC organization and your coaches from your host sites. Qualifications We are looking for a Graduate Engineering Trainee in AkzoNobel-Marshall located in Dilovası. University degree in Mechatronic, Electrical & Electronics, Industrial and Chemical Engineering preferable universities. Eager to have a career in manufacturing and supply chain organization. Excellent communication & interpersonal skills Flexible and able to adapt to learn AkzoNobel methods and philosophy Excellent command of English Good knowledge of MS Office tools No restriction for travelling in and out of Country Willing to relocate to other countries on completion of the 24 months GET program. Willing to live in Kocaeli or İstanbul Asia Job Description Actively participates in process optimization and investment projects. Identifies improvement opportunities and designs solutions. Tracks and controls project budgets and timelines to ensure project completion within the approved limits. Monitors projects compliance to applicable codes, practices, QA/QC policies, performance standards and specifications. Cooperates and communicates daily with project members and stakeholders to interpret their needs and requirements and provides assistance and technical support. Uses of statistical analysis and appropriate business excellence project management processes to identify areas of significant improvement and develops plans to realize the benefits. Investigates root cause of process failures, develops solutions for non-conforming products and implements improvement plans. Uses data analysis and problem-solving methodologies to maximize plant and equipment effectiveness to achieve optimum life cycle cost of production equipment. We offer: 24-month development program (12 months in our factory in Turkey and the next 12 months of development in other AkzoNobel's factory in Europe). Opportunities to start career in multinational company and in different functional areas, such as Production, Engineering, Quality, Planning. Permanent job in one of the AkzoNobel's factories in EMEA, after successfully completing the GET program. Possibility of gaining knowledge through the practice. Mentoring and co-creating a diverse and supportive GET community in the EMEA region. Valuable work experience in multinational environment. Support in relocation. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age or disability. Show more Show less

listings.title: CAREER EXPERIENCE DRIVE – FINANCIAL OPERATIONS INTERN
listings.description: VitrA Tiles, which ranks first in exports to the EU, started production in Istanbul Tuzla in 1991 and in Bilecik Bozüyük in 1992. VitrA Tiles, which has been producing ceramic tiles in its factory in Russia since 2011, has a total annual production capacity of 30 million square meters. VitrA Tiles products are offered for sale in 75 countries, especially in the Turkish and German markets. VitrA Tiles carries the 60 years of expertise of the VitrA brand to all living spaces in the house, especially the bathroom; It also offers products suitable for use in many different areas such as pools, gardens and exteriors. VitrA Tiles, which constantly develops innovative texture and material solutions, sets the trends in surfaces with its new collections every year. VitrA's tiles with the "TSE Double Star" Certificate also hold the first eco-label given by the European Union to a ceramic brand from Turkey. Our production facility in Bozuyuk has been included in the "Global Lighthouse Network", which the World Economic Forum (WEF) selects as the most advanced production facilities in the world and points out as the "production facility of the future". What Do We Expect From Our New Teammate? Preparation and updating of VAT (Value Added Tax) lists prepared for the tax office, Supporting the organization of documentation related to VAT declarations to ensure tax compliance, and submitting them to relevant authorities when necessary, Recording and updating data related to export-registered sales, Collaborating with exporting companies for the preparation and follow-up of customs declarations, Regular review of invoices, payments, and supplier reconciliations. You are exactly the person we are looking for! Your team is waiting for you! What kind of teammate are we looking for? If you are a 3rd-year student in a relevant undergraduate program, If you have a good command of English, If you can use MS Office programs efficiently, If you are available to participate in a long-term internship at least three days a week, If you are interested in the field of finance, If you are a team player with a solution-oriented mindset, If you are proactive, result-oriented, and have strong time management skills, If you enjoy taking responsibility and are eager to learn. «You should live your career, development, life and future at Eczacıbaşı!» What do we offer to you? You can constantly improve your personal, professional and technical competencies and participate in our training programs that will support you and your career. Global opportunities and rotation opportunities in more than 120 international markets among more than 40 organizations can always knock on your door. At Eczacıbaşı, leaves are calculated according to the person's seniority based on the person's total working experience. Your leave comes with you. We always applaud success with different reward methods. You can benefit from location-independent or hybrid working opportunities with working models that vary according to the nature of your job, and you can determine your own work schedule with flexible working hours. We offer a technology and ergonomics support package to Eczacıbaşı employees who work remotely full-time. It is privileged to be a mother and father at Eczacıbaşı. At Eczacıbaşı, our employees who are mothers are provided with monthly nursery allowance and our employees who are fathers are entitled to 3 weeks of paternity leave. We are committed to providing equal opportunity in employment. We value diversity and do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or veteran status. #WeDoNotDifferentiateBetweenJobsForWomenAndMen Show more Show less

listings.title: Quality System Management Trainee
listings.description: About Us PHINIA: Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. PHINIA is an independent, market-leading, premium solutions and components provider with over 100 years of manufacturing expertise and industry relationships, with a strong brand portfolio that includes DELPHI®, DELCO REMY® and HARTRIDGE™. With over 12,500 employees across 43 locations in 20 countries, PHINIA is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, USA. At PHINIA, we Provide fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket products and solutions of the highest quality — developed and manufactured responsibly — that are designed to enhance efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of vehicles, industrial machinery, and other applications. In doing so, we contribute to a cleaner tomorrow, treat our people and surrounding communities with respect, and hold ourselves accountable to robust ethical standards. Our Culture PHINIA promotes and cultivates an inclusive culture and diverse perspectives, strives to maintain its reputation for excellence, thrives on the power of collaboration, and fosters the development of our talented employees. We believe in making a positive impact through our business and actions, and we take our collective responsibility seriously. Career Opportunities We believe in building a brighter tomorrow for our employees as well as our customers and encourage you to learn about our long history, strong culture, new technologies, and future vision. We offer a strong local presence and interesting global opportunities. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow. Job Purpose PHINIA is looking for a “Management Trainee” to work at its plant in Izmir for the Quality Department. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow! Key Responsibilities Graduating from the industrial, mechanical engineering department, etc. Fluency in English MS Office proficiency Strong problem-solving and analytical capabilities Strong communication skills Passionate to learn and eager to take initiative Quality Core Tools information is a plus What We Offer We provide compensation and benefits programs intended to attract, motivate, reward, and retain an incredibly talented, globally diverse workforce at all levels within our organization. Our compensation programs are informed by market data and business needs, and we are committed to providing equitable and competitive compensation. We are committed to providing our team with quality and competitive benefit programs, including health and well-being resources, family-centric policies, and an agile workplace program, where not precluded by collective bargaining agreements or national statutory plans. Plans are benchmarked for competitiveness and value. We provide formal development opportunities at all levels and stages of employee careers. These opportunities are delivered in a variety of formats to make our portfolio of solutions agile, sustainable, and scalable to support our employees in developing the skills needed to succeed. What We Believe Product Leadership - Innovation that brings value to our customers Humility - Seeking out diverse perspectives and working collaboratively Inclusivity - Recognizing our differences makes us stronger; we are bold and intentional Net-Zero - Committed to energy efficiency, waste reduction and beneficial reuse Integrity - Taking responsibility for our decisions and doing what is right Accountability - Taking ownership of our actions and driving results SAFETY You will consistently hear us say Safety First! We are committed to continually improving our strong safety performance supporting the health and wellness of our employees! We also believe employee health and safety is everyone’s responsibility. We encourage safety learning and collaboration to help employees understand and follow applicable safety policies, standards, and procedures and identify opportunities to minimize or eliminate risk. Work is expected to be conducted in a manner that stresses the importance of preventing incidents and illnesses, including attending all required safety meetings and trainings. It is expected that all incidents, near misses, and unsafe conditions are immediately reported to the direct manager, Human Resources, or Safety Representative. EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY PHINIA is an equal employment opportunity employer such that all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. VISA SPONSORSHIP PHINIA does provide sponsorship for employment visa status based on business need. However, for this role, applicants must be currently authorized to work on a full-time basis, in the country where the position is currently based. NO UNAUTHORIZED REFERRALS FROM RECRUITERS & VENDORS Please note that PHINIA does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or offers from third party recruiters or staffing agencies associated with any published or unpublished employment opportunities. Any unsolicited information sent to PHINIA will be considered as unencumbered and free from any fee or charge whatsoever. Only members of our Human Resources Team have the authority to engage or authorize recruiting services, which must be agreed upon before the unsolicited resume or offer is received. GLOBAL TERMS OF USE AND PRIVACY STATEMENT Carefully read the PHINIA Privacy Policy before using this website. Your ability to access and use this website and apply for a job at PHINIA are conditioned on your acceptance and compliance with these terms. Please access the linked document by clicking here, select the geographical area where you are applying for employment, and review. Before submitting your application you will be asked to confirm your agreement with the terms. Career Scam Disclaimer: PHINIA makes no representations or guarantees regarding employment opportunities listed on any third-party website. To protect against career scams, job applicants should take the necessary precautions when interviewing for and accepting employment positions allegedly offered by PHINIA. Applicants should never provide their national ID numbers, birth dates, credit card numbers, bank account information or other private information when communicating with prospective employers or responding to employment opportunities online. Job applicants are invited to contact PHINIA through PHINIA’s website to verify the authenticity of any employment opportunities. Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. Join us on this shared journey to a brighter tomorrow. For more information about PHINIA, please visit www.phinia.com. Show more Show less

listings.title: Agency Operations Project Intern (TTLIVE-MENAT) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
listings.description: Responsibilities We are the Agency Operations Team, focusing on the construction and growth of the TikTok LIVE Agency Ecosystem. We are mainly responsible for Agency Recruitment and Incubation, helping the high-quality development of live streaming business. As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Responsibilities: Support offline and online recruitment events, sort out agency resources, follow up on the progress of connections and complete recruitment-related follow up. Be responsible for new Agency Education-related work, including the creation of educational materials (manuals, PPT, etc.), online/offline meeting presentations, and daily agency Q&A, to help new Agencies get started with the business quickly; Assist AM (Account Manager) in incubating potential agencies, follow up on the growth progress and monitor agency's task completion rate. Be responsible for data analysis related to recruitment and operations, statistics of core data such as agency recruitment conversion rate, education completion rate, and incubation effect, and output basic analysis reports to support business optimization; Cooperate with the team to complete other daily agency operation-related work to ensure the efficient implementation of various businesses. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications Currently pursuing a bachelor's degree or above, major is not limited; able to commit to at least 4 working days per week for an internship period of 3 months or more (6 months is preferred) High level of fluency in Turkish and English Strong interest in the Internet industry, live streaming field (TikTok LIVE is preferred) and agency operations Good data analysis and summary capabilities, proficient in using Excel for data statistics and basic analysis, able to quickly sort out business problems and judge priorities Proficient in using Office software (Word, PPT), with basic copywriting and material creation capabilities Strong communication, coordination, negotiation and learning abilities, serious and responsible at work, with good team spirit and execution Preferred Qualifications Internship experience in Agency operations, channel recruitment or user operations is preferred; Familiarity with the Turkish live streaming market and local agency characteristics is preferred; Experience in data analysis, ability to independently output simple analysis reports and possess certain business insight capabilities is preferred. Proficiency in tools such as PS and Figma is a plus Job Information About TikTok TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo. Why Join Us Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day. We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us. Diversity & Inclusion TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too. Show more Show less

listings.title: People & Culture Intern (Long-Term)
listings.description: Founded in Belgium in 1961, Ravago is a prominent global brand with operations in over 60 countries, more than 325 locations, and over 10,000 employees serving over 56,000 customers. Ravago continues to make a global impact within Europe, North America, Asia, and Africa. Guided by our mission to “to be at the heart of your life,” we are committed to growing and strengthening our presence every day, upholding our values of entrepreneurship, professionalism, humility, and human-focus. Ravago Turkey, headquartered in Ataşehir, operates with over 1,600 employees across 16 locations throughout Turkey. One of the largest petrochemical producers in Turkey, we aim to meet special product demands that are not available in the market with our extensive product range and R&D efforts. We are not only one of the top industrial enterprises but are also a preferred brand in more than 50 countries where we export our products. We are looking for a Long-Term Intern – People & Culture to join Ravago Türkiye at our Ataşehir office . Desired Qualifications: Currently enrolled as an undergraduate student at a university Mandatory internship insurance provided by the university Able to attend the internship at least 3 - 4 days per week Proficiency in MS Office programs Strong communication skills, analytical thinking ability, and a team-oriented mindset Eager to learn and open to personal and professional development What We Expect from You: Support daily operational tasks within the People & Culture (HR) Department Assist in recruitment processes , including job posting follow-ups, candidate communication, and interview scheduling Support training and development processes , including entering and tracking training records in relevant systems Assist in the coordination of training activities and maintain related documentation Collaborate with team members and support ongoing HR projects and initiatives Additional Information: This position is for a long-term internship opportunity within the People & Culture Department . Interviews will be conducted online. Only candidates whose internship insurance is covered by their university and who meet the requirements will be evaluated. Show more Show less

listings.title: Monetization Intern
listings.description: Lucida AI is a fast-growing AI startup building speech-based AI learning and conversational applications used by millions of users globally. We are looking for a Monetization Intern who wants to learn how subscription and in-app purchase monetization works at scale and help optimize revenue across our mobile apps. This role is highly hands-on and ideal for candidates who are curious about subscriptions, paywalls, pricing experiments, and gamification-driven monetization . What You'll Do Support optimization of in-app purchases, subscriptions, and offer structures (weekly, monthly, yearly plans, trials, intro offers). Help design monetization mechanics connected to gamification features (rewards, streaks, unlockable premium features). Assist in analyzing paywall and purchase funnel performance (conversion, trial activation, renewal). Support execution of A/B tests on pricing, bundles, messaging, and paywall layouts. Track key monetization metrics such as conversion rate, ARPU, retention, and churn. Research competitor monetization strategies and summarize insights. Work closely with Product, Growth, and Design teams to improve revenue performance. Requirements 3rd or 4th year university student or recent graduate (Engineering, Economics, Business, or related fields). Strong interest in mobile apps, monetization, pricing, or growth. Analytical mindset and comfort working with data (Excel / Sheets preferred). Curiosity about subscription business models and experimentation. Fluent English communication skills. Able to work full-time internship (3-6 months) Benefits Work directly on real monetization decisions impacting millions of users globally. Learn how leading mobile AI apps optimize subscriptions, paywalls, and LTV. Fast-learning startup environment with real ownership from day one. Opportunity to transition into a full-time Monetization / Growth role after the internship. Show more Show less

listings.title: Web Internship Opportunity for 4th Year Students
listings.description: Overview Are you a motivated and ambitious student eager to gain long-term, hands-on experience in software development? We are looking for talented and enthusiastic 4th-year engineering or computer science students who are passionate about honing their skills in Angular. As a long-term intern at our company, you will have the chance to work on real-world projects, contribute to product development, and gain valuable insights into various aspects of the software development lifecycle. If you're ready to take the next step in your career and commit to an extended internship experience, we encourage you to apply today! Responsibilities Collaborate with the development team to design, develop, and maintain web applications. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code using Angular. Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving code quality. Assist in troubleshooting, debugging, and optimizing application performance. Research and implement new technologies to enhance our products and processes. Requirements Currently enrolled as a 4th-year student in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field. Basic knowledge of Angular (academic or personal projects are acceptable). Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Good communication skills and ability to work in a team. (Nice to have) Familiarity with C#. Who We Are We are a global technology company, developing AI-powered conversational solutions that empower organizations to be data-driven, enhance efficiency, and offer superior customer experiences. We are an R&D center and our solutions are developed by a team of over 100 engineers specializing in text-to-speech, speech recognition, natural language processing, and voice biometrics technologies. As of 2022 we are a part of Unifonic, a leading Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) provider, we have grown into an international organization with over 500 dynamic team members. We have a customer base of 500 enterprises across 20 countries in the US, EU and MENA regions. At Sestek, we believe in the power of diversity, and inclusive organizational culture. All candidates are considered equally regardless of their race, religion, color, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national or ethnic origin, marital status, family status, disability, genetic characteristics. If you would like to know more about our culture, please feel free to visit our LinkedIn Page. Show more Show less

listings.title: IT Proje Yönetimi Stajyeri
listings.description: İş Tanımı: Kapsamlı SAP S/4HANA dönüşüm projesinde Proje Yönetim Ofisi (PMO) süreçlerine doğrudan destek vermek, İş birimleri ile IT ekipleri veya danışman firmalar arasında gerçekleşen toplantılara katılarak toplantı tutanaklarını hazırlamak, alınan aksiyonları ilgili araçlar (Jira, Cloud ALM vb.) üzerinde kaydetmek ve takibini yapmak, Süreç analizi, test senaryolarının düzenlenmesi ve veri göçü (data migration) hazırlıkları gibi proje fazlarında proje yöneticisine asiste etmek, Proje gidişatı ile ilgili haftalık/aylık durum raporlarının ve üst yönetim sunumlarının hazırlanmasına katkı sağlamak, İhtiyaç duyulduğunda proje dokümanlarının İngilizce - Türkçe çevirilerini yapmak ve proje arşivini düzenli tutmak. Genel Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin Endüstri Mühendisliği, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri (MIS), İşletme Mühendisliği veya Bilgisayar Mühendisliği bölümlerinde 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrencisi, Haftanın en az 3 günü projelere destek verebilecek, Uzun dönem (6 ay ve üzeri) staja devam edebilecek, İleri derecede yazılı ve sözlü İngilizce bilgisine sahip (Özellikle IT ve iş terminolojisine aşinalık, toplantılarda anlık not alabilme ve çeviri/dokümantasyon yapabilecek) Analitik düşünme yeteneği gelişmiş, detaylara önem veren ve takip yönü güçlü, Etkili iletişim kurabilen ve takım çalışmasına yatkın. Kurumsal Kaynak Planlama (ERP) sistemlerine ve özellikle SAP ekosistemine (S/4HANA) kariyer anlamında ilgi duyan, Proje yönetimi metodolojileri (Agile, Scrum, Kanban) hakkında temel düzeyde teorik bilgi sahibi ve öğrenmeye istekli, Tercihen SAP Activate metodolojisi hakkında araştırma yapmış veya fikir sahibi, Proje takip ve görev yönetim araçlarına (Jira, SAP Cloud ALM, Trello, Asana vb.) teknolojik olarak yatkın, MS Office programlarını (özellikle Excel ve PowerPoint) ileri seviyede kullanabilen, üst yönetim standartlarında görsel kalitesi yüksek sunumlar hazırlamaya destek olabilecek Bilgi Teknolojileri Proje Stajyeri arayışımız bulunmaktadır. listings.description: Geleceğin Mayasında İz Bırakmak İsteyen Öğretmenler! Yeni eğitim-öğretim yılında mevcut okullarımızda görev almak üzere “Stajyer Sınıf Öğretmeni” arıyoruz. listings.title: Taste the Future - Long-Term Internship in Quality Assurance
listings.description: Job Description Are You Ready to Make It Happen at Mondelēz International? Join our Mission to Lead the Future of Snacking. Make It Matter. As an organization we are committed to developing the next generation of Makers and Bakers. Joining us at an early career stage in our fast paced and ever changing environment will enable you to do more, learn more and grow more. You will be encouraged to step outside your comfort zone– you may even surprise yourself! We will ensure you are given the support you need to be at your best and enable you to be yourself and bring passion and personality. Here you can lean in and speak up and bring your own flavor. More About This Role What you need to know about this position: You will gain experience in maintenance, quality or production in one of our Gebze plants (Gum & Candy or Bakery), You will receive a structured onboarding and mentoring process, You will get exposure to real-world engineering projects in a modern manufacturing environment. You will be a part of a dynamic and supportive team culture focused on continuous improvement and innovation. What extra ingredients you will bring: Having a unique perspective, Strong willingness to learn, grow, and face technical challenges, Proactive mindset with the ability to work both independently and in a team, Languages: English & local language Strong collaboration and relationship management skills, 3rd or final-year students in Chemical, Food, Mechanical, Electric-Electronical or Mechatronic Engineering. You have a GPA above 3.00. Job specific requirements: You are able to continue your internship between February and June, 3 days a week, You are eligible to be an long term intern (at least 13-14 weeks) and your university is sponsoring your insurance. Relocation Support Available? No Relocation support available Business Unit Summary We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! Our people make all the difference in our succes Mondelēz International is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or preference, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. listings.title: Satış Operasyon Destek Stajyeri
listings.description: Watsons Türkiye, dünya çapında 31 pazarda 12 perakende markasıyla 17.000’den fazla mağaza işleten ve 130.000’den fazla çalışanı bulunan, dünyanın en büyük uluslararası sağlık ve güzellik perakendecisi AS Watson Group ’un bir parçasıdır. AS Watson Group, 2024 mali yılı itibarıyla 24 milyar ABD doları gelir elde etmiş olup, her yıl O+O (Offline plus Online) platformları aracılığıyla 6 milyardan fazla müşteriye teknoloji destekli perakende deneyimi sunmaktadır. Watsons, Asya’nın lider O+O sağlık ve güzellik perakendecisi olarak 16 Asya, Avrupa ve Orta Doğu pazarında 8.000 mağaza ve 1.500’den fazla eczane ile faaliyet göstermektedir. Watsons Türkiye, 66 şehirde 450’den fazla mağazası ve 3.500’den fazla çalışanı ile Türkiye’nin önde gelen güzellik ve kişisel bakım perakendecilerinden biridir. Müşterilerine sunduğu ürün ve hizmetlerle hayatlarında pozitif bir fark yaratmayı hedeflemektedir. Watsons, Asya’nın 1 Numaralı Kişisel Bakım ve Güzellik Perakendecisidir .* *Campaign Asia tarafından 6 Asya ülkesinde 9.000 katılımcıyla gerçekleştirilen "En İyi 50 Müşteri Deneyimi Markası" anketinin sonuçlarına dayanmaktadır. W-Generation Staj Programımız: Yeni mezun isen, W-Generation Staj Programımızda tam zamanlı olarak Merkez Ofis'deki departmanlarımızda staj imkanı bulabilirsin. Burada ailemizin bir parçası olup kurum kültürümüzü yakından tanıma ve çalışmak istediğin departmanda iş tecrübesi kazanma şansı yakalayabilirsin. Eğer aşağıdaki kriterleri sağlıyorum ve ben de W-Generation Staj Programı’na dahil olmak istiyorum diyorsan başvurunu bekliyoruz! * The data you share is protected and processed within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"). For detailed information, you can visit https://www.watsons.com.tr/calisan-adayi-aydinlatma-metni. * 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ("KVKK") kapsamında paylaşmış olduğunuz veriler korunmakta ve işlenmektedir. Ayrıntılı bilgi için https://www.watsons.com.tr/calisan-adayi-aydinlatma-metni adresini ziyaret edebilirsiniz. Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinde öğrenimine devam eden, tercihen son sınıf öğrencisi olan, 1 yıl boyunca, haftanın 5 günü ilgili ekibe destek olabilecek, MS Office programlarını etkin kullanabilen, İyi derecede İngilizce bilen, Ekip ile çalışmaktan ve beraber geliştirmekten keyif alan, Yaptığı işe kendi bakış açısını ve merakını katan, İletişim ve planlama becerisi, takip ve koordinasyon yeteneği yüksek olan, Sorumluluk bilinci gelişmiş, Detaylı ve analitik bakış açısına sahip. İş Tanımı Satış Operasyon departmanının destek biriminin süreçlerine destek vermek. *Bu staj tam zamanlı çalışma gerektirdiği için Stajyer çalışanlara ücret ödemesi yapılmaktadır. listings.title: Summer Intern, Art
listings.description: Attention all aspiring undergraduate Art Students! Are you excited about the idea of exploring a vibrant and colorful world of gaming? Sounds like a blast, doesn't it? If you answered yes, then we have the perfect opportunity for you! Join our Art Internship program and spend two months in our office to get a taste of our working environment and get ready to level up your skills! Our internship program will give you a unique opportunity to put your skills to the table and dive into the end-to-end visual development cycle. You will gain practical experience in the creative pipeline while learning proven techniques from professionals. Illustration Intern creates concepts and support the team with illustrations that meet the requirements of the production 3D Art Intern takes concepts and recreates them into the final production in line with Peak’s art style 2D Animation Intern contributes to the project with engaging and captivating animations, making it come to life Here’s what you’ll do Participate in various projects to demonstrate and improve your skills Experiment with dummy trials for the in-game item and asset animations Collaborate with the team to understand and address feedback for iterations Implement creative art solutions Keep up-to-date with the latest industry trends and techniques, and experiment with different styles What we’re looking for Be enrolled in 3rd or 4th year of university preferably in Fine Art, or a related field Have a schedule that allows you to work full-time in the Peak office for 2 months during the summer of 2026 Have a passion for the cartoon art style Familiarity with digital visualization tools (i.e. Photoshop, Illustrator, Maya, Blender, Spine, After Effects) Enthusiastic approach to learning new techniques and practicing them Application and Hiring Process We encourage you to select the internship opportunity that best matches your interests. Your application will be evaluated based on your choice. We'd love to see examples of your skills! We will consider applications that include a portfolio showcasing your skill set. It may include school assignments or personal projects. Make sure your portfolio is well-organized and emphasizes the skills that would make you a great fit for the internship position you're interested in Share your portfolio as an online link Ensure your documents are up to 100 MB For showcasing 3D works, an image-based portfolio would suffice Once your application and portfolio have been reviewed and selected for the next stage, you'll have an online interview with our HR team and Art Team. The internship period will be between July 1st and August 28th, 2026. Last day to apply is March 22nd. We hope to hear from you soon! Show more Show less

listings.title: Uzun Dönem Zorunlu Stajyer
listings.description: İş Özeti Kiwa, Test, muayene ve Belgelendirme (TIC) alanında 'Dünyadaki ilk 20' öncü şirket arasındadır. Belgelendirme, muayene, test, eğitim ve teknoloji hizmetlerimizle müşterilerimizin ürün, hizmet, süreç, (yönetim) sistemi ve çalışanlarına güven kazandırıyoruz. Bunu çok çeşitli pazar segmentlerinde gerçekleştiriyoruz. Faaliyet gösterdiğimiz pazarlar inşaattan enerji tedariğine, içme suyu, sağlık, gıda, yem ve tarıma kadar değişkenlik göstermektedir. Uzmanlık alanlarımız, yönetim sistemleri, kurumsal sosyal sorumluluk ve laboratuvar testlerini ve çok daha fazlasını içerir. Üretim ve süreç endüstrileri, (ticari) hizmetler, kamu ve özel kuruluşlar, devletler ve uluslararası kuruluşlardan müşterilerimiz bulunmaktadır. Kiwa, Avrupa , Asya , Amerika ve Okyanusya'da 40'ten fazla ülkede 10.000'den fazla kişiyi istihdam etmektedir. 2021 yılından beri SHV Şirketler Ailesi'nin bir üyesiyiz. İstanbul Başakşehir'de bulunan şubemize “Uzun Dönem Stajyer” arıyoruz. İş Tanımı Müşteri talep, öneri ve şikayetlerinin sistem üzerinden kayıt altına alınmasına destek verilmesi, Gelen çağrı ve e-posta süreçlerinin ilgili birimlere doğru ve zamanında yönlendirilmesi, Müşteri memnuniyetine yönelik süreçlerin takibine katkı sağlanması, Günlük/haftalık raporlama çalışmalarına destek olunması, Departman içi operasyonel süreçlerde aktif rol alınması. İş Gereklilikleri Üniversitelerin İşletme, İktisat, Uluslararası Ticaret ve Lojistik, Pazarlama, Halkla İlişkiler ve Tanıtım, İletişim,Büro Yönetimi ve Yönetici Asistanlığı veya benzeri bölümlerinde öğrenim gören, Zorunlu stajı bulunan, Haftanın en az 3 günü aktif olarak devam edebilecek, Uzun dönem staj yapabilecek, Tercihen İstanbul Avrupa Yakası’nda ikamet eden, Sözlü ve yazılı iletişim becerileri güçlü, Planlama ve takip yönü kuvvetli, sorumluluk bilinci yüksek, MS Office programlarını etkin kullanabilen. Beklentileriniz Sizi ve kariyerinizi destekleyen academy programlarımıza katılarak kişisel, mesleki ve teknik yetkinliklerinizi sürekli geliştirebilirsiniz. 40'tan fazla ülkede 10.000'den fazla çalışanın olan uluslararası alanda rotasyon ve global fırsatlar her zaman kapınızı çalabilir. Başarıları her zaman farklı ödüllendirme yöntemleri ile destekliyoruz. Show more Show less

listings.title: BASF Türk Kimya Dispersiyon, Reçineler ve Katkı Mad. Dept. Uzun Dönem Stajyer
listings.description: GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI Dünyanın lider kimya şirketi BASF Türk Kimya Dispersiyon, Reçineler ve Katkı Maddeleri Departmanı Ataşehir ofisinde, Mayıs 2026 itibarıyla göreve başlayacak ve öğrenciliği minimum Haziran 2027’ye kadar devam eden uzun dönem stajyer arayışımız mevcuttur. Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin Kimya, Kimya Mühendisliği veya ilgili Mühendislik bölümlerinde Lisans öğrenciliği minimum Haziran 2027 yılına kadar devam eden, Haftanın en az 3 günü staj için zaman ayırabilecek ve haftada 1 gün fiziki katılım gösterebilecek, İstanbul’da ikamet eden, MS Office programlarına hakim, özellikle MS Excel ve Powerpoint kullanabilen, İyi derecede İngilizce bilgisine sahip, Analitik düşünme yeteneğine sahip, öğrenmeye açık, iletişimi kuvvetli uzun dönem stajyer arayışımız mevcuttur. İş Tanımı Satış ekibinin müşteri numunelerinin girişi ve takibinin yapılması, Satış raporlarına ve sunumlarına destek verilmesi, Müşterilere ürün MSDS, TDS vb. belgelerin gönderilmesinin sağlanması, ERP sisteminde yeni müşteri ve tedarikçilerin tanımlanması, Önemli Not Sadece yukarıda belirtilen kriterlere uygun adaylarla görüşülecektir. Görüşmeler online olarak yapılacaktır. Staj için kısmi fiziki katılım gerekecektir. Telefon mülakatı için +49’lu (Almanya kodlu) numaradan gelen çağrının kabul edilmesini rica ederiz. Show more Show less

listings.title: Alumil NextGen Internship Program: Launch Your Career with Alumil
listings.description: Alumil NextGen is an internship program offering university students who are goal-oriented, eager to learn, and development-focused the opportunity to make a strong start to their careers. Through this program, participants gain real-world professional experience in a dynamic manufacturing and corporate environment across various departments, including Engineering, Architecture, Marketing, Human Resources, Logistics, Finance, and Sales . Throughout the program, students will become part of a team that develops innovative solutions for the construction industry, discover themselves with mentorship support , and expand their professional network . As a NextGen Intern, you will... Make an Impact You will contribute to Alumil Ege's business objectives by taking part in real business projects, and directly assume a role in tasks such as analysis, design, and process support. Gain Valuable Skills You will enhance both your technical and soft skills through hands-on learning and training sessions, strengthening areas like problem-solving, communication, teamwork, and project ownership . Build Your Professional Network You will connect with professionals from different departments and participate in team events, workshops, and company organizations. Learn from Your Mentors You will be paired with an experienced mentor who will guide you, support your development, and help you shape your career goals. Experience Different Fields You will gain insight into the various functions of our organization, discovering how interdepartmental collaboration works and how shared success is achieved. Innovate and Grow We encourage you to think creatively, share your ideas, and develop new approaches. Innovation starts with curiosity, and innovation drives progress—your perspective is important to us. Job Description: Project Participation: Actively participate in real-world business projects and assignments, including tasks such as analysis, design, process improvement, and operational support Business Enhancement: Contribute to the development of innovative solutions for the construction industry with creative ideas and approaches Process Support: Fulfill supporting duties that help the assigned department's daily workflow and aid in achieving business goals Learning and Development: Attend technical and soft-skill training sessions, workshops, and internal company organizations offered throughout the program Communication and Collaboration: Communicate effectively with professionals from various departments and participate in cross-functional collaboration projects Mentorship: Seek guidance from the assigned mentor, establish and follow personal development goals based on regular feedback Requirements Must be a final-year student in an undergraduate or graduate program, OR a recent graduate who has graduated no more than 2 years ago . Must be studying/have graduated from one of the following or related disciplines: Engineering (Mechanical, Civil, Industrial, etc.) Architecture Business Administration / Economics Marketing / Communications Logistics / Supply Chain Human Resources Benefits Financial Terms: The NextGen Internship Program offers a paid internship opportunity . Interns will be subject to the company's established compensation policies for the duration of their tenure. Social Advantages: Our interns are entitled to full access to all social rights and benefits offered to Alumil employees throughout the program (e.g., meal services, transportation etc.). At ALUMIL we are building excellence every day. Alumil has more than 30 years of experience in the production of architectural aluminium systems and 3.000 employees. We are one of the most advanced companies globally owning state-of-the art production lines in our 12 factories in Europe. Alumil, is a family-owned business that also embraces all of its employees like family. Our culture's primary focus is on integrity, team spirit, initiative, loyalty and "meraki" (spirited work). ALUMIL opposes any discrimination, unequal treatment and violation of human rights and ensures the provision of equal opportunities at work. When hiring and evaluating employees, it does not discriminate based on race, gender, religion, age, disability, sexual orientation, nationality, political beliefs or social status. Show more Show less

listings.title: Digital WINtern, L’Oréal Dermatological Beauty
listings.description: The world leader in beauty, present in 150 countries on five continents! Our 53 international brands include L’Oréal Paris, Kiehl’s, Vichy, Giorgio Armani Beauty, Garnier, Yves Saint Laurent Beauté, Ralph Lauren, Maybelline New York, Kérastase, Biotherm, Lancôme, NYX PMU, L’Oréal Professionnel, Vichy, La Roche-Posay, Diesel, Cerave and many more… For more than a century, L’Oréal has devoted itself solely to one business: beauty. We strive to be the 1st beauty-tech company all around the world! Beauty is a powerful force that moves us. Our goal is to offer each and every person around the world the best of beauty in terms of quality, efficacy, safety, sincerity and responsibility to satisfy all beauty needs and desires in their infinite diversity. Our ambition for the coming years is to create the beauty that moves the world! If you are ready to take charge of your career and join us on our quest for the next billion consumers, follow us to get the insider scoop on our business, culture, and tips on how to join us to shape the future of beauty. Join our Dermatological Beauty Division! What You’ll Do You have your own specific job descriptions; you take high responsibility and empowerment to take initiative and also you are allowed to learn through your mistakes. Do You Have What It Takes 3rd or 4th year Undergraduate or 1st Year Master Students, earliest graduation is January 2027. Flexible schedule to work at least 2,5 days in a week at school period for min. 6 months Advanced level of MS Office applications Good communication skills Strong analytical problem-solving skills Ambitious, confident and able to take initiative Excellent communication skills in English What Could L’oréal Offer You The ultimate place to win and achieve your career dreams if you take initiative and push the boundaries while helping others shine along the way Work with some of the biggest brands and experts in the business, and the most passionate people A diverse environment Opportunity to be at the center of digital transformation World class training and development #WEARELOREAL Show more Show less

İş Tanımı İSG ve Bakım ile ilgili takip, raporlama ve dokümantasyon konularında destek vermek, Ekip aktivitelerinde etkin rol ve sorumluluk almak, Satınalma süreçlerine destek vermek, Bölümde tamamlanması gereken sistemsel süreçlerle alakalı SAP vb. sistemlerini kullanmak Önemli Not Sadece yukarıda belirtilen kriterlere uygun adaylarla görüşülecektir.
